<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Capital Hub</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <!-- Updated Fonts: Ensure weights 300 and 600 are available for Inter Tight -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter+Tight:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700;900&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* --- VARIABLES & RESET --- */
        :root {
            --bg-main: #0F0F12;
            --bg-card: #18181B;
            --bg-secondary: #111113;
            --border-color: #2A2D34;
            --text-main: #F5F6F7;
            --text-secondary: #6B7280;
            --text-muted: #9CA3AF;
            --accent-white: #FFFFFF;
            --font-main: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            --font-serif: 'Inter Tight', sans-serif;
            --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; /* Prevent font scaling in landscape on iOS */
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            overflow-x: hidden;
            line-height: 1.5;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            margin: 0; /* Reset body margin for GHL compatibility */
        }

        /* --- TYPOGRAPHY --- */
        h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 500; /* Default medium */
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        p, li, a, span, div, button, input, label {
            font-family: var(--font-main);
        }
        
        /* Exception for Headlines override */
        .title-font { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }

        a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: inherit;
        }

        button {
            border: none;
            background: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        .font-mono { font-family: var(--font-mono) !important; }
        .font-serif { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }
        .uppercase { text-transform: uppercase; }
        .text-center { text-align: center; }
        
        /* --- UTILITIES --- */
        .container {
            width: 100%;
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            padding-right: 1.5rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .container { max-width: 640px; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .container { max-width: 768px; padding-left: 2rem; padding-right: 2rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { .container { max-width: 1024px; } }
        @media (min-width: 1280px) { .container { max-width: 1280px; } }

        .flex { display: flex; }
        .flex-col { flex-direction: column; }
        .items-center { align-items: center; }
        .justify-center { justify-content: center; }
        .justify-between { justify-content: space-between; }
        .gap-2 { gap: 0.5rem; }
        .gap-3 { gap: 0.75rem; }
        .gap-4 { gap: 1rem; }
        .gap-6 { gap: 1.5rem; }
        .gap-8 { gap: 2rem; }
        .w-full { width: 100%; }
        .relative { position: relative; }
        .absolute { position: absolute; }
        .inset-0 { top: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; left: 0; }
        .z-10 { z-index: 10; }
        .z-20 { z-index: 20; }
        .hidden { display: none; }

        /* --- SELECTION --- */
        ::selection {
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            color: var(--bg-main);
        }

        /* --- LOADING SCREEN --- */
        #loader {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
        }
        .loader-content h2 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            animation: pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .loader-content h2 { font-size: 2.25rem; }
        }
        .loader-bar-container {
            width: 8rem;
            height: 1px;
            background-color: var(--border-color);
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-top: 1rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .loader-bar-container { width: 12rem; } }
        .loader-bar {
            height: 100%;
            width: 100%;
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            transform-origin: left;
            animation: grow 1.5s ease-in-out forwards;
        }

        /* --- CUSTOM CURSOR --- */
        #custom-cursor {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 9999;
            mix-blend-mode: difference;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            opacity: 0;
        }
        #cursor-dot {
            width: 0.75rem;
            height: 0.75rem;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
            transition: transform 0.2s ease-out;
        }
        #cursor-dot.clicked {
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.5);
        }
        @media (hover: none) and (pointer: coarse) {
            #custom-cursor { display: none !important; }
            body { cursor: auto; }
        }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) {
            body { cursor: none; }
        }

        /* --- HEADER --- */
        header {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%;
            z-index: 40;
            padding: 1rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: all 0.5s ease;
            background-color: transparent;
        }
        header.scrolled {
            padding: 1rem 0;
            background-color: rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.9);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border-bottom-color: var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            header:not(.scrolled) { padding: 1.5rem 0; }
        }
        .logo-text {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .logo-text { font-size: 1rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .logo-text { font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em; } }

        /* --- BUTTONS --- */
        .btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 2px;
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important; /* Buttons keep mono for UI feel */
            font-weight: 500;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
            position: relative;
        }
        .btn-sm { padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.625rem; }
        .btn-md { padding: 1rem 2rem; font-size: 0.75rem; }
        .btn-lg { padding: 1.25rem 2.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; }
        
        .btn-solid {
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            color: black;
        }
        .btn-solid:hover { background-color: #E5E5E5; }
        
        .btn-outline {
            background-color: transparent;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            border-color: var(--border-color);
        }
        .btn-outline:hover {
            border-color: var(--accent-white);
            background-color: var(--border-color);
        }

        .btn .icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .btn:hover .icon {
            transform: translate(2px, -2px);
        }

        /* --- HERO --- */
        .hero-section {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            position: relative;
        }
        .hero-video-container {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 0;
        }
        .hero-video {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            filter: grayscale(100%);
            opacity: 0.4;
        }
        .hero-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background-color: rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.8);
        }
        .hero-gradient {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(to top, #0F0F12 0%, transparent 50%, rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.5) 100%);
        }
        .hero-content {
            z-index: 10;
            padding-top: 8rem;
            padding-bottom: 5rem;
            text-align: center;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-content { padding-top: 10rem; padding-bottom: 6rem; } }

        .hero-badge {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            max-width: 100%;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .hero-badge { gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } 
        }
        .badge-dot {
            width: 0.375rem;
            height: 0.375rem;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .badge-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; } }
        
        .badge-text {
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important; /* CHANGED from mono */
            color: var(--text-muted);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.025em;
            white-space: normal;
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 1.25;
            font-size: 8px; /* Specific mobile requirement */
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .badge-text { font-size: 9px; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .badge-text { font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5; } }

        /* H1 STYLES - ANIMATED GRADIENT & TYPOGRAPHY */
        h1.hero-title {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.2;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            word-wrap: break-word;
            
            /* Gradient Text Logic */
            background: linear-gradient(
                90deg,
                #FFFFFF 0%,
                #9CA3AF 20%,
                #FFFFFF 40%,
                #FFFFFF 100%
            );
            background-size: 200% auto;
            color: #FFFFFF; /* Fallback */
            background-clip: text;
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            animation: textShine 6s linear infinite;
        }

        /* Mobile specific H1 overrides - Font Smoothing ensured */
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
            h1.hero-title {
                -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
                -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            }
        }

        @keyframes textShine {
            to {
                background-position: 200% center;
            }
        }

        /* UPDATED: THINNER WEIGHTS AS REQUESTED */
        .h1-light {
            font-weight: 300; /* Changed from 200 to 300 (Light) */
        }
        .h1-bold {
            font-weight: 600; /* Changed from 900/700 to 600 (SemiBold) */
        }

        @media (min-width: 640px) { h1.hero-title { font-size: 2.25rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            h1.hero-title { 
                font-size: 3.25rem;
                line-height: 1.1;
                max-width: 900px;
                margin-left: auto;
                margin-right: auto;
            } 
        }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { 
            h1.hero-title { 
                font-size: 4rem;
                max-width: 1100px;
            } 
        }

        .hero-subtitle {
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 9px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            white-space: nowrap; /* Forced single line */
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .hero-subtitle { font-size: 0.75rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } }

        .price-text {
            font-size: 1.125rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .price-text { font-size: 1.25rem; } }

        .social-proof {
            margin-top: 2rem;
            padding-top: 1.5rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 32rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .social-proof { 
                margin-top: 3rem; 
                padding-top: 2rem;
                max-width: 100%; /* Ensure container allows full width */
                /* Removed white-space: nowrap to allow wrapping for long text if needed, while keeping layout cleaner */
                overflow: visible;
            } 
            .social-proof span { display: inline !important; }
        }

        /* --- SECTIONS --- */
        .section {
            padding: 4rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .section { padding: 6rem 0; } }

        .bg-darker { background-color: var(--bg-secondary); }

        .section-tag {
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        .section-title {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.25;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .section-title { font-size: 3rem; } }

        /* --- SERVICES GRID --- */
        .services-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            max-width: 80rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); } }

        .service-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            position: relative;
            min-height: 250px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .service-card { padding: 2rem; min-height: 300px; } }
        .service-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent-white); }
        
        .step-number {
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important;
            font-size: 1.875rem;
            color: var(--border-color);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .step-number { font-size: 2.25rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } }
        .service-card:hover .step-number { color: var(--accent-white); }

        .service-icon {
            position: absolute;
            top: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--border-color);
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .service-icon { top: 2rem; right: 2rem; } }
        .service-card:hover .service-icon { color: var(--accent-white); }
        .service-icon svg {
            transform: rotate(-45deg);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .service-card:hover .service-icon svg { transform: rotate(0); }
        
        /* Typography fix for card headers */
        .service-card h4 { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }

        /* --- BIO SECTION --- */
        .bio-container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 2.5rem;
            max-width: 80rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
            align-items: start;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .bio-container { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem; } }
        
        /* UPDATED BIO COLLAGE: MASONRY LAYOUT */
        .bio-collage-container {
            column-count: 2; /* CSS Columns for Masonry */
            column-gap: 8px; /* Mobile gap */
            width: 100%;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .bio-collage-container {
                column-gap: 10px; /* Desktop gap */
            }
        }

        .collage-item {
            break-inside: avoid; /* Prevent items from splitting across columns */
            margin-bottom: 8px; /* Vertical gap mobile */
            border-radius: 2px;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .collage-item { margin-bottom: 10px; }
        }

        .collage-img {
            width: 100%;
            height: auto; /* Allow natural aspect ratio */
            object-fit: cover;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            display: block;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }

        /* Casual Labels Styles */
        .casual-label {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 6px;
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            font-style: italic;
            font-size: 11px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            pointer-events: none;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
            z-index: 10;
        }
        
        .label-left {
            left: 6px;
        }
        .label-right {
            right: 6px;
        }

        @media (min-width: 768px) {
             .casual-label { font-size: 12px; bottom: 8px; }
             .label-left { left: 8px; }
             .label-right { right: 8px; }
        }

        /* --- OFFER SECTION --- */
        .offer-wrapper {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-wrapper { border: 1px solid var(--border-color); } }
        
        .offer-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-grid { grid-template-columns: 7fr 5fr; } }
        
        .offer-list-col {
            padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .offer-list-col { padding: 4rem; border-bottom: none; border-right: 1px solid var(--border-color); } 
        }
        
        .offer-price-col {
            padding: 2rem;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-price-col { padding: 4rem; } }
        
        .check-icon-box {
            width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem;
            background-color: var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 2px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            color: white;
        }

        .price-large {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 3.75rem;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .price-large { font-size: 6rem; } }

        /* --- GUARANTEE SECTION --- */
        .guarantee-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 2rem;
            max-width: 64rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .guarantee-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } }
        
        .guarantee-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .guarantee-card { padding: 2.5rem; } }
        
        .glow-effect {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; right: 0;
            width: 8rem; height: 8rem;
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            filter: blur(50px);
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(50%, -50%);
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        .guarantee-card:hover .glow-effect { opacity: 1; }

        /* --- FAQ SECTION --- */
        .faq-container {
            max-width: 48rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        .faq-item {
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        .faq-trigger {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 1.5rem 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: flex-start;
            text-align: left;
            color: var(--text-main);
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-trigger:hover { color: var(--accent-white); }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-trigger { align-items: center; } }
        
        .faq-question {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.25;
            padding-right: 1rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-question { font-size: 1.125rem; } }
        
        .faq-content {
            max-height: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: max-height 0.3s ease, margin-bottom 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-item.active .faq-content {
            max-height: 24rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        .faq-text {
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            padding-right: 1rem;
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-text { padding-right: 2rem; } }

        /* --- FOOTER --- */
        .footer {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            padding-top: 4rem;
            padding-bottom: 3rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer { padding-top: 6rem; } }
        
        .footer-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
            padding-bottom: 3rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 4fr 8fr; gap: 5rem; margin-bottom: 5rem; } 
        }

        .footer-disclaimer {
            font-size: 0.6875rem;
            color: #4B5563;
            line-height: 1.6;
            column-count: 1;
            column-gap: 2rem;
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer-disclaimer { column-count: 2; } }
        .footer-disclaimer p { margin-bottom: 1rem; }

        /* --- ANIMATIONS --- */
        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: .5; }
        }
        @keyframes grow {
            0% { width: 0%; }
            100% { width: 100%; }
        }

        /* --- BACKGROUND NOISE --- */
        .bg-noise {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: -1;
            overflow: hidden;
            pointer-events: none;
            background-image: url('https://www.orfeoai.com/wp-content/themes/orfeoai/images/noise.png');
            opacity: 0.02;
        }

        /* --- MOBILE PADDING FIXES (Max 768px) --- */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            /* Fixes for grids and containers that touch edges on mobile */
            .services-grid, 
            .bio-container, 
            .guarantee-grid, 
            .faq-container {
                padding-left: 1.5rem !important;
                padding-right: 1.5rem !important;
            }

            /* Convert Offer Wrapper to a card with margins on mobile */
            .offer-wrapper {
                margin-left: 1.5rem !important;
                margin-right: 1.5rem !important;
                width: auto !important;
                border: 1px solid var(--border-color) !important;
            }

            /* Ensure Footer container definitely has padding */
            .footer .container {
                padding-left: 1.5rem !important;
                padding-right: 1.5rem !important;
            }
        }

    </style>

                </button>
                <div class="faq-content">
                    <p class="faq-text">Sí. No tendría sentido montar esto si no lo fuera. Empresas nos contactan cada semana buscando perfiles que no encuentran en ningún lado. Comerciales, marketers, gente de tech, IA, etc. Son ofertas reales de empresas reales.</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
                <button class="faq-trigger">

                </button>
                <div class="faq-content">
                    <p class="faq-text">Depende de tu dedicación, pero nuestra promesa es que en 90 días o menos puedes conseguir tu primer trabajo remoto si sigues el proceso y te formas en serio.</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
                <button class="faq-trigger">
                    <span class="faq-question">¿Qué pasa si no me gusta?</span>
                    <span class="text-secondary"><svg class="icon-plus" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="M12 5v14"/></svg><svg class="icon-minus hidden" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/></svg></span>
                </button>
                <div class="faq-content">
                    <p class="faq-text">Tienes 30 días de garantía. Si no te convence, te devolvemos el 100% de tu dinero. Sin preguntas.</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="text-center" style="margin-top: 4rem;">
                <p class="text-muted" style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">¿Aún tienes dudas?</p>
                <a href="mailto:hola@capitalhub.com" class="btn btn-md btn-outline">CONTÁCTANOS</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- FOOTER -->
    <footer class="footer">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="footer-grid">
                <div>
                    <h4 class="text-white uppercase" style="font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">CAPITAL HUB</h4>
                    <!-- CHANGED: removed font-mono -->
                    <div style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-secondary); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem;">
                        <p>¿Tienes dudas?</p>
                        <p class="text-white">+34 623 600 094</p>
                        <p class="text-white">hola@capitalhub.com</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <!-- CHANGED: removed font-mono -->
                    <h5 class="text-secondary uppercase" style="font-size: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Sobre lo que ofrecemos</h5>
                    <div class="footer-disclaimer">
                        <p>Capital Hub es una plataforma de formación en profesiones digitales con acceso a una bolsa de empleo real. Todo nuestro contenido tiene fines educativos e informativos.</p>
                        <p>Los resultados que puedas obtener dependen de muchos factores: tu punto de partida, tu dedicación, el tiempo que inviertas y tu capacidad de aplicar lo aprendido. Por eso, aunque ponemos todo de nuestra parte para darte las mejores herramientas, no podemos prometer resultados específicos ni ingresos concretos. Cada persona es diferente y cada camino también.</p>
                        <p>Las cifras que mencionamos en esta página son ejemplos reales pero ilustrativos. Sirven para que entiendas el potencial del mercado, no como garantía de lo que tú vas a ganar.</p>
                        <p>Lo que sí te garantizamos es la calidad de la formación. Si accedes al contenido y no estás satisfecho, tienes 30 días para pedir un reembolso completo. Sin complicaciones.</p>
                        <p>Los testimonios que aparecen reflejan experiencias de personas reales, pero son individuales. Lo que a ellos les funcionó puede no ser exactamente igual para ti.</p>
                        <p>Nada de lo que encuentres aquí sustituye el asesoramiento de un profesional legal, fiscal o financiero. Antes de tomar decisiones importantes, consulta con quien corresponda.</p>
                        <p>Al registrarte en Capital Hub, aceptas que las decisiones que tomes y los resultados que obtengas son tu responsabilidad.</p>
                        <p>Los precios pueden cambiar sin previo aviso. Algunas ofertas incluyen servicios de suscripción con cargos recurrentes. Revisa siempre los detalles antes de comprar.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- CHANGED: removed font-mono -->
            <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #4B5563; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem;">
                <p>Este producto es propiedad de Adrián Villanueva & Capital Hub.</p>
                <div style="display: flex; gap: 1rem;">
                    <span>Copyright 2025</span>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#" style="transition: color 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.color='white'" onmouseout="this.style.color='inherit'">Política de Privacidad</a>
                </div>
            </div>
            <style>
                @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer div:last-child { flex-direction: row; } }
            </style>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <script>
        // --- LOADER LOGIC ---
        window.addEventListener('load', () => {
            const loader = document.getElementById('loader');
            // Ensure loader stays for at least 1s as per original design
            setTimeout(() => {
                loader.style.opacity = '0';
                setTimeout(() => {
                    loader.style.display = 'none';
                }, 500);
            }, 1000);
        });

        // --- CUSTOM CURSOR LOGIC ---
        const cursor = document.getElementById('custom-cursor');
        const cursorDot = document.getElementById('cursor-dot');
        const isMobile = /Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent);

        if (!isMobile) {
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                cursor.style.transform = `translate3d(${e.clientX}px, ${e.clientY}px, 0)`;
            });

            document.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => cursor.style.opacity = '1');
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => cursor.style.opacity = '0');

            document.addEventListener('mousedown', () => cursorDot.classList.add('clicked'));
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => cursorDot.classList.remove('clicked'));
        }

        // --- HEADER SCROLL LOGIC ---
        const header = document.getElementById('main-header');
        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            if (window.scrollY > 50) {
                header.classList.add('scrolled');
            } else {
                header.classList.remove('scrolled');
            }
        });

        // --- FAQ TOGGLE LOGIC ---
        const faqItems = document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item');
        faqItems.forEach(item => {
            const trigger = item.querySelector('.faq-trigger');
            const iconPlus = item.querySelector('.icon-plus');
            const iconMinus = item.querySelector('.icon-minus');

            trigger.addEventListener('click', () => {
                // Toggle active class
                item.classList.toggle('active');
                
                // Toggle icons
                if (item.classList.contains('active')) {
                    iconPlus.classList.add('hidden');
                    iconMinus.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    iconPlus.classList.remove('hidden');
                    iconMinus.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>

payload.text:
TRABAJO SOBRE LANDING PARA GOHIGHLEVEL

REGLAS INNEGOCIABLES:
- Actualiza ÚNICAMENTE el archivo index.html.
- NO devuelvas el código dentro del chat.
- Muestra el resultado renderizado en el panel de preview.
- Entrega el archivo final como botón/pestaña "index.html" en la parte inferior.
- Todo el contenido debe estar en HTML + CSS + JavaScript plano dentro de index.html.
- El diseño debe verse EXACTAMENTE igual en Preview y en GoHighLevel.
- NO cambiar nada que no esté explícitamente pedido.
- NO eliminar, mover ni modificar secciones existentes.
- Mantén animaciones y dinámicas existentes.

CAMBIOS A REALIZAR (SOLO ESTOS):

1. SECCIÓN BIO — FOTOS: ELIMINAR HUECOS NEGROS:
Actualmente el grid de fotos tiene huecos/espacios negros vacíos en la parte inferior derecha tanto en mobile como en desktop. Esto ocurre porque las fotos no encajan perfectamente en el grid de 2 columnas.

Corrección:
- Reordena las 8 fotos para que las alturas de las dos columnas queden lo más equilibradas posible, minimizando cualquier hueco negro al final.
- Alterna fotos verticales y horizontales entre las dos columnas para que ambas columnas tengan una altura total similar.
- Si es necesario, ajusta ligeramente el aspect-ratio de alguna foto para que encaje mejor y no quede espacio vacío visible.
- El objetivo es que las dos columnas terminen a la misma altura o muy cerca, sin huecos negros evidentes.

2. SECCIÓN BIO — FOTOS MÁS PEQUEÑAS EN DESKTOP:
En desktop las fotos ocupan demasiado espacio vertical. Reduce el tamaño general de las fotos en desktop para que el grid de fotos no sea más alto que el texto de la bio que está al lado derecho. Las fotos deben acompañar al texto, no dominar toda la sección. Reduce la anchura máxima del contenedor de fotos o reduce la escala de las fotos hasta que queden proporcionadas con el texto.

3. NO TOCAR:
- El texto de la bio.
- Las etiquetas de las 3 fotos (Muay Thai, 100km, Mi madre).
- El resto de secciones.
- Mobile padding lateral.

ENTREGA:
Devuélveme:
1) El archivo index.html actualizado como botón/pestaña.
2) El resultado renderizado en el preview.
3) Un resumen breve de los cambios aplicados.

**Addressing Layout Issues**

I'm currently focused on the `index.html` file, specifically the Bio section's photo grid. The key problem I've identified is the presence of black gaps due to the masonry layout's uneven column heights. This needs immediate attention.


**Balancing Grid Heights**

I've moved on from identifying the initial layout problem to developing a solution. My current plan focuses on reordering photos in the grid to equalize column heights. I'll need to slightly tweak aspect ratios, if necessary, and reduce the grid size on desktop to align it with the text. The goal is to balance the visual weight while preserving all existing elements.


**Evaluating Layout Options**

I'm now comparing CSS masonry and grid layouts. The initial approach with `column-count: 2` offers a natural masonry effect, but I'm considering a 2-column flex or grid layout for better control. This should help to eliminate the black gaps I've observed by manually placing images in specific columns. I need to make sure the labels 100km, Muay Thai, and Mother are implemented.


**Calculating Column Heights**

I've determined a rough method for balancing my grid layout. By estimating the heights of images, I'm ordering them for a `column-count: 2` approach. I am using a visual estimation based on photo shapes to calculate this, trying to distribute the vertical and horizontal images evenly across columns.


**Prioritizing Column Consistency**

I'm now prioritizing the column structure. The conflicting requirements regarding aspect ratios are a hurdle, and I need to balance preserving the original format with eliminating gaps. After examining the HTML order and comparing `column-count`, Flexbox, and Grid, I've decided to test a `column-count` approach first. This way, I can minimize JavaScript dependency and prioritize mobile adaptability, only reordering the HTML if it does not work. My focus is on robustly resolving the layout challenges while remaining flexible.


**Refining Visual Balance**

I'm now implementing the column balancing strategy with specific images like "Italia" and "Bali" assigned to one column, and "Croacia" and "Muay Thai" to the other. I'm focusing on the visual impact of unequal column heights, especially on desktop. My strategy includes tweaking the container width; I'm leaning toward using `grid-template-columns: 0.8fr 1.2fr` to reduce the photo column's width directly. I'll be testing this to keep the images shorter vertically without clipping them.


**Testing Grid Adjustments**

I'm now implementing adjustments to the `.bio-container` grid columns for desktop, specifically changing `grid-template-columns` to `0.8fr 1.2fr`. This reduces the photo column's width, and I'll see if it has the desired effect of keeping the images shorter vertically without clipping. To prevent gaps, I must consider equal column heights. I am evaluating whether using `column-count` with `break-inside: avoid` is sufficient or if I need a 2-column Grid/Flex layout.



**Implementing Flexbox Solution**

I've decided to address the gaps by structuring the images into two HTML columns using a Flexbox container. This gives me explicit control over how the images stack and eliminates gaps caused by uneven heights in a CSS grid setup. The new structure uses `<div class="bio-col">` containers inside a `<div class="bio-collage-wrapper">` for flex display. I'll test the new layout to ensure it renders correctly on different screen sizes.



**Distributing Images Effectively**

I'm now in the process of manually arranging the images within the Flexbox columns. My aim is to balance column heights by distributing vertical and horizontal images. I am now focused on a balanced display, ensuring that vertical photos are paired with horizontal ones in the two Flexbox columns I created. I am considering each images' orientation and now assigning them to either left or right columns, aiming for a harmonious visual flow.


**Finalizing Visual Harmony**

I'm now refining the Flexbox layout, aiming to implement a more balanced height for each column by mixing vertical and horizontal images and letting them align naturally, or by setting `flex:1` on the last images. I'm focusing on the responsive adjustments for desktop, constrained the `.bio-collage-container` to maintain proportionality with the text using `grid-template-columns`. I will use a percentage split, aiming for `40% 60%` or `35% 65%`, to reduce photo size and improve the vertical alignment with bio content.


**Implementing Image Labels**

I'm now integrating specific image labels and refining their placement within the Flexbox columns. I've assigned "Muay Thai," "100km," and "Mother" labels, positioning them correctly as either `label-left` or `label-right`. I've re-ordered the images across the two columns to improve visual balance. I'm focusing on the implementation details, like image file names, to ensure labels display with associated images, as planned, and testing it with the intended images.


**Refactoring Collage Structure**

I'm now fully replacing the `column-count` approach with a Flexbox layout for the image collage. The existing HTML will be updated with two `<div class="bio-col">` columns within the `.bio-collage-wrapper`, providing explicit control. The updated CSS will include the `.bio-col` styling for proper Flexbox display. I'll change the `grid-template-columns` to 4fr 6fr, as I intended. I will provide the full `index.html` file to the user.


**Adjusting Image Distribution**

I'm now revising image distribution across Flexbox columns. I'm focusing on the orientation of the images and the associated labels "Muay Thai," "100km," and "Mother," to ensure the columns are visually balanced. Currently, I'm adjusting the image order, swapping "Childhood" from the right to the left column to better balance their heights, with their labels correctly placed.


**Rebalancing Image Flow**

I'm now distributing images to ensure labels are well-placed and columns are balanced. "Muay Thai" with its label will be on the left, "100km" and "Mother" with their labels will be on the right. I've re-ordered the images across columns, to include the label distribution, aiming to visually balance the columns. I'm prioritizing overall harmony.



**Optimizing Label Placement**

I'm now refining label placement and arrow directions within the Flexbox columns. I've confirmed arrow placements for "Muay Thai," "100km," and "Mother," adjusting based on label position (bottom left or right) for proper in-image pointing. I'll proceed with testing and further implementation, ensuring each label's arrow visually aligns with its corresponding image and overall column balance.


**Coding Layout Refinements**

I'm now writing the code, focusing on final adjustments to eliminate gaps in the Flexbox columns. Setting `width: 100%` on images is a key element for full coverage. I'm now aiming for a balanced vertical layout, distributing images based on "V" and "H" types: the proposed distribution places a Vertical photo, then a Horizontal photo, and another Vertical photo, on the left column.


**Adjusting Column Composition**

I'm now revising my column composition based on image orientation for a balanced vertical layout. Previously, I was considering placing a horizontal image "Friends" in column 1, but I'll now place "Croacia" on the right, and "Childhood" on the left column for better visual balance, distributing images based on "V" and "H" types: the proposed distribution places a Vertical photo, then a Horizontal photo, and another Vertical photo, on the left column.


**Balancing Columns Visually**

I'm now revising the column's image composition. The aim is visual balance, considering both tall and wide images. After reviewing the photos, I'm thinking of placing tall images, Italia, and Bali, in Column 1. I'll pair them with "Friends" and "Muay Thai". In Column 2, I'll place the remaining tall photos (100km, Mother, Childhood) and Croacia. I'm exploring an aspect-ratio adjustment for square images (Childhood), and trying this distribution.

entries.description: Update Bio section to use a balanced 2-column flex layout for photos to minimize gaps, adjust desktop grid ratio to reduce photo column width, and ensure specific labels are correctly placed.

diffs.replacement:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Capital Hub</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <!-- Updated Fonts: Ensure weights 300 and 600 are available for Inter Tight -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter+Tight:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700;900&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* --- VARIABLES & RESET --- */
        :root {
            --bg-main: #0F0F12;
            --bg-card: #18181B;
            --bg-secondary: #111113;
            --border-color: #2A2D34;
            --text-main: #F5F6F7;
            --text-secondary: #6B7280;
            --text-muted: #9CA3AF;
            --accent-white: #FFFFFF;
            --font-main: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            --font-serif: 'Inter Tight', sans-serif;
            --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; /* Prevent font scaling in landscape on iOS */
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            overflow-x: hidden;
            line-height: 1.5;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            margin: 0; /* Reset body margin for GHL compatibility */
        }

        /* --- TYPOGRAPHY --- */
        h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 500; /* Default medium */
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        p, li, a, span, div, button, input, label {
            font-family: var(--font-main);
        }
        
        /* Exception for Headlines override */
        .title-font { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }

        a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: inherit;
        }

        button {
            border: none;
            background: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        .font-mono { font-family: var(--font-mono) !important; }
        .font-serif { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }
        .uppercase { text-transform: uppercase; }
        .text-center { text-align: center; }
        
        /* --- UTILITIES --- */
        .container {
            width: 100%;
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            padding-right: 1.5rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .container { max-width: 640px; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .container { max-width: 768px; padding-left: 2rem; padding-right: 2rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { .container { max-width: 1024px; } }
        @media (min-width: 1280px) { .container { max-width: 1280px; } }

        .flex { display: flex; }
        .flex-col { flex-direction: column; }
        .items-center { align-items: center; }
        .justify-center { justify-content: center; }
        .justify-between { justify-content: space-between; }
        .gap-2 { gap: 0.5rem; }
        .gap-3 { gap: 0.75rem; }
        .gap-4 { gap: 1rem; }
        .gap-6 { gap: 1.5rem; }
        .gap-8 { gap: 2rem; }
        .w-full { width: 100%; }
        .relative { position: relative; }
        .absolute { position: absolute; }
        .inset-0 { top: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; left: 0; }
        .z-10 { z-index: 10; }
        .z-20 { z-index: 20; }
        .hidden { display: none; }

        /* --- SELECTION --- */
        ::selection {
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            color: var(--bg-main);
        }

        /* --- LOADING SCREEN --- */
        #loader {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
        }
        .loader-content h2 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            animation: pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .loader-content h2 { font-size: 2.25rem; }
        }
        .loader-bar-container {
            width: 8rem;
            height: 1px;
            background-color: var(--border-color);
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-top: 1rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .loader-bar-container { width: 12rem; } }
        .loader-bar {
            height: 100%;
            width: 100%;
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            transform-origin: left;
            animation: grow 1.5s ease-in-out forwards;
        }

        /* --- CUSTOM CURSOR --- */
        #custom-cursor {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 9999;
            mix-blend-mode: difference;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            opacity: 0;
        }
        #cursor-dot {
            width: 0.75rem;
            height: 0.75rem;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
            transition: transform 0.2s ease-out;
        }
        #cursor-dot.clicked {
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.5);
        }
        @media (hover: none) and (pointer: coarse) {
            #custom-cursor { display: none !important; }
            body { cursor: auto; }
        }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) {
            body { cursor: none; }
        }

        /* --- HEADER --- */
        header {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%;
            z-index: 40;
            padding: 1rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: all 0.5s ease;
            background-color: transparent;
        }
        header.scrolled {
            padding: 1rem 0;
            background-color: rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.9);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border-bottom-color: var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            header:not(.scrolled) { padding: 1.5rem 0; }
        }
        .logo-text {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .logo-text { font-size: 1rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .logo-text { font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em; } }

        /* --- BUTTONS --- */
        .btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 2px;
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important; /* Buttons keep mono for UI feel */
            font-weight: 500;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
            position: relative;
        }
        .btn-sm { padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.625rem; }
        .btn-md { padding: 1rem 2rem; font-size: 0.75rem; }
        .btn-lg { padding: 1.25rem 2.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; }
        
        .btn-solid {
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            color: black;
        }
        .btn-solid:hover { background-color: #E5E5E5; }
        
        .btn-outline {
            background-color: transparent;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            border-color: var(--border-color);
        }
        .btn-outline:hover {
            border-color: var(--accent-white);
            background-color: var(--border-color);
        }

        .btn .icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .btn:hover .icon {
            transform: translate(2px, -2px);
        }

        /* --- HERO --- */
        .hero-section {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            position: relative;
        }
        .hero-video-container {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 0;
        }
        .hero-video {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            filter: grayscale(100%);
            opacity: 0.4;
        }
        .hero-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background-color: rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.8);
        }
        .hero-gradient {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(to top, #0F0F12 0%, transparent 50%, rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.5) 100%);
        }
        .hero-content {
            z-index: 10;
            padding-top: 8rem;
            padding-bottom: 5rem;
            text-align: center;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-content { padding-top: 10rem; padding-bottom: 6rem; } }

        .hero-badge {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            max-width: 100%;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .hero-badge { gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } 
        }
        .badge-dot {
            width: 0.375rem;
            height: 0.375rem;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .badge-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; } }
        
        .badge-text {
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important; /* CHANGED from mono */
            color: var(--text-muted);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.025em;
            white-space: normal;
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 1.25;
            font-size: 8px; /* Specific mobile requirement */
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .badge-text { font-size: 9px; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .badge-text { font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5; } }

        /* H1 STYLES - ANIMATED GRADIENT & TYPOGRAPHY */
        h1.hero-title {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.2;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            word-wrap: break-word;
            
            /* Gradient Text Logic */
            background: linear-gradient(
                90deg,
                #FFFFFF 0%,
                #9CA3AF 20%,
                #FFFFFF 40%,
                #FFFFFF 100%
            );
            background-size: 200% auto;
            color: #FFFFFF; /* Fallback */
            background-clip: text;
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            animation: textShine 6s linear infinite;
        }

        /* Mobile specific H1 overrides - Font Smoothing ensured */
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
            h1.hero-title {
                -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
                -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            }
        }

        @keyframes textShine {
            to {
                background-position: 200% center;
            }
        }

        /* UPDATED: THINNER WEIGHTS AS REQUESTED */
        .h1-light {
            font-weight: 300; /* Changed from 200 to 300 (Light) */
        }
        .h1-bold {
            font-weight: 600; /* Changed from 900/700 to 600 (SemiBold) */
        }

        @media (min-width: 640px) { h1.hero-title { font-size: 2.25rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            h1.hero-title { 
                font-size: 3.25rem;
                line-height: 1.1;
                max-width: 900px;
                margin-left: auto;
                margin-right: auto;
            } 
        }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { 
            h1.hero-title { 
                font-size: 4rem;
                max-width: 1100px;
            } 
        }

        .hero-subtitle {
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 9px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            white-space: nowrap; /* Forced single line */
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .hero-subtitle { font-size: 0.75rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } }

        .price-text {
            font-size: 1.125rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .price-text { font-size: 1.25rem; } }

        .social-proof {
            margin-top: 2rem;
            padding-top: 1.5rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 32rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .social-proof { 
                margin-top: 3rem; 
                padding-top: 2rem;
                max-width: 100%; /* Ensure container allows full width */
                /* Removed white-space: nowrap to allow wrapping for long text if needed, while keeping layout cleaner */
                overflow: visible;
            } 
            .social-proof span { display: inline !important; }
        }

        /* --- SECTIONS --- */
        .section {
            padding: 4rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .section { padding: 6rem 0; } }

        .bg-darker { background-color: var(--bg-secondary); }

        .section-tag {
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        .section-title {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.25;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .section-title { font-size: 3rem; } }

        /* --- SERVICES GRID --- */
        .services-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            max-width: 80rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); } }

        .service-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            position: relative;
            min-height: 250px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .service-card { padding: 2rem; min-height: 300px; } }
        .service-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent-white); }
        
        .step-number {
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important;
            font-size: 1.875rem;
            color: var(--border-color);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .step-number { font-size: 2.25rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } }
        .service-card:hover .step-number { color: var(--accent-white); }

        .service-icon {
            position: absolute;
            top: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--border-color);
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .service-icon { top: 2rem; right: 2rem; } }
        .service-card:hover .service-icon { color: var(--accent-white); }
        .service-icon svg {
            transform: rotate(-45deg);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .service-card:hover .service-icon svg { transform: rotate(0); }
        
        /* Typography fix for card headers */
        .service-card h4 { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }

        /* --- BIO SECTION --- */
        .bio-container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 2.5rem;
            max-width: 80rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
            align-items: start;
        }
        /* UPDATED: grid-template-columns adjusted to 0.8fr 1.2fr (40% / 60%) to reduce photo size in desktop */
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .bio-container { grid-template-columns: 0.8fr 1.2fr; gap: 4rem; } }
        
        /* UPDATED BIO COLLAGE: FLEX COLUMNS (Explicit control) */
        .bio-collage-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px; /* Mobile gap */
            width: 100%;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .bio-collage-container {
                gap: 10px; /* Desktop gap */
            }
        }

        .bio-col {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            flex: 1;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .bio-col { gap: 10px; }
        }

        .collage-item {
            position: relative;
            border-radius: 2px;
            overflow: hidden;
            width: 100%;
        }

        .collage-img {
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            object-fit: cover;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            display: block;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }

        /* Casual Labels Styles */
        .casual-label {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 6px;
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            font-style: italic;
            font-size: 11px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            pointer-events: none;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
            z-index: 10;
        }
        
        .label-left {
            left: 6px;
        }
        .label-right {
            right: 6px;
        }

        @media (min-width: 768px) {
             .casual-label { font-size: 12px; bottom: 8px; }
             .label-left { left: 8px; }
             .label-right { right: 8px; }
        }

        /* --- OFFER SECTION --- */
        .offer-wrapper {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-wrapper { border: 1px solid var(--border-color); } }
        
        .offer-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-grid { grid-template-columns: 7fr 5fr; } }
        
        .offer-list-col {
            padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .offer-list-col { padding: 4rem; border-bottom: none; border-right: 1px solid var(--border-color); } 
        }
        
        .offer-price-col {
            padding: 2rem;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-price-col { padding: 4rem; } }
        
        .check-icon-box {
            width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem;
            background-color: var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 2px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            color: white;
        }

        .price-large {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 3.75rem;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .price-large { font-size: 6rem; } }

        /* --- GUARANTEE SECTION --- */
        .guarantee-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 2rem;
            max-width: 64rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .guarantee-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } }
        
        .guarantee-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .guarantee-card { padding: 2.5rem; } }
        
        .glow-effect {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; right: 0;
            width: 8rem; height: 8rem;
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            filter: blur(50px);
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(50%, -50%);
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        .guarantee-card:hover .glow-effect { opacity: 1; }

        /* --- FAQ SECTION --- */
        .faq-container {
            max-width: 48rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        .faq-item {
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        .faq-trigger {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 1.5rem 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: flex-start;
            text-align: left;
            color: var(--text-main);
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-trigger:hover { color: var(--accent-white); }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-trigger { align-items: center; } }
        
        .faq-question {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.25;
            padding-right: 1rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-question { font-size: 1.125rem; } }
        
        .faq-content {
            max-height: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: max-height 0.3s ease, margin-bottom 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-item.active .faq-content {
            max-height: 24rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        .faq-text {
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            padding-right: 1rem;
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-text { padding-right: 2rem; } }

        /* --- FOOTER --- */
        .footer {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            padding-top: 4rem;
            padding-bottom: 3rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer { padding-top: 6rem; } }
        
        .footer-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
            padding-bottom: 3rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 4fr 8fr; gap: 5rem; margin-bottom: 5rem; } 
        }

        .footer-disclaimer {
            font-size: 0.6875rem;
            color: #4B5563;
            line-height: 1.6;
            column-count: 1;
            column-gap: 2rem;
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer-disclaimer { column-count: 2; } }
        .footer-disclaimer p { margin-bottom: 1rem; }

        /* --- ANIMATIONS --- */
        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: .5; }
        }
        @keyframes grow {
            0% { width: 0%; }
            100% { width: 100%; }
        }

        /* --- BACKGROUND NOISE --- */
        .bg-noise {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: -1;
            overflow: hidden;
            pointer-events: none;
            background-image: url('https://www.orfeoai.com/wp-content/themes/orfeoai/images/noise.png');
            opacity: 0.02;
        }

        /* --- MOBILE PADDING FIXES (Max 768px) --- */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            /* Fixes for grids and containers that touch edges on mobile */
            .services-grid, 
            .bio-container, 
            .guarantee-grid, 
            .faq-container {
                padding-left: 1.5rem !important;
                padding-right: 1.5rem !important;
            }

            /* Convert Offer Wrapper to a card with margins on mobile */
            .offer-wrapper {
                margin-left: 1.5rem !important;
                margin-right: 1.5rem !important;
                width: auto !important;
                border: 1px solid var(--border-color) !important;
            }

            /* Ensure Footer container definitely has padding */
            .footer .container {
