<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Capital Hub</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <!-- Updated Fonts: Ensure weights 300 and 600 are available for Inter Tight -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter+Tight:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700;900&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* --- VARIABLES & RESET --- */
        :root {
            --bg-main: #0F0F12;
            --bg-card: #18181B;
            --bg-secondary: #111113;
            --border-color: #2A2D34;
            --text-main: #F5F6F7;
            --text-secondary: #6B7280;
            --text-muted: #9CA3AF;
            --accent-white: #FFFFFF;
            --font-main: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            --font-serif: 'Inter Tight', sans-serif;
            --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; /* Prevent font scaling in landscape on iOS */
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            overflow-x: hidden;
            line-height: 1.5;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            margin: 0; /* Reset body margin for GHL compatibility */
        }

        /* --- TYPOGRAPHY --- */
        h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 500; /* Default medium */
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        p, li, a, span, div, button, input, label {
            font-family: var(--font-main);
        }
        
        /* Exception for Headlines override */
        .title-font { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }

        a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: inherit;
        }

        button {
            border: none;
            background: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        .font-mono { font-family: var(--font-mono) !important; }
        .font-serif { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }
        .uppercase { text-transform: uppercase; }
        .text-center { text-align: center; }
        
        /* --- UTILITIES --- */
        .container {
            width: 100%;
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            padding-right: 1.5rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .container { max-width: 640px; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .container { max-width: 768px; padding-left: 2rem; padding-right: 2rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { .container { max-width: 1024px; } }
        @media (min-width: 1280px) { .container { max-width: 1280px; } }

        .flex { display: flex; }
        .flex-col { flex-direction: column; }
        .items-center { align-items: center; }
        .justify-center { justify-content: center; }
        .justify-between { justify-content: space-between; }
        .gap-2 { gap: 0.5rem; }
        .gap-3 { gap: 0.75rem; }
        .gap-4 { gap: 1rem; }
        .gap-6 { gap: 1.5rem; }
        .gap-8 { gap: 2rem; }
        .w-full { width: 100%; }
        .relative { position: relative; }
        .absolute { position: absolute; }
        .inset-0 { top: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; left: 0; }
        .z-10 { z-index: 10; }
        .z-20 { z-index: 20; }
        .hidden { display: none; }

        /* --- SELECTION --- */
        ::selection {
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            color: var(--bg-main);
        }

        /* --- LOADING SCREEN --- */
        #loader {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
        }
        .loader-content h2 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            animation: pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .loader-content h2 { font-size: 2.25rem; }
        }
        .loader-bar-container {
            width: 8rem;
            height: 1px;
            background-color: var(--border-color);
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-top: 1rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .loader-bar-container { width: 12rem; } }
        .loader-bar {
            height: 100%;
            width: 100%;
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            transform-origin: left;
            animation: grow 1.5s ease-in-out forwards;
        }

        /* --- CUSTOM CURSOR --- */
        #custom-cursor {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 9999;
            mix-blend-mode: difference;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            opacity: 0;
        }
        #cursor-dot {
            width: 0.75rem;
            height: 0.75rem;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
            transition: transform 0.2s ease-out;
        }
        #cursor-dot.clicked {
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.5);
        }
        @media (hover: none) and (pointer: coarse) {
            #custom-cursor { display: none !important; }
            body { cursor: auto; }
        }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) {
            body { cursor: none; }
        }

        /* --- HEADER --- */
        header {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%;
            z-index: 40;
            padding: 1rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: all 0.5s ease;
            background-color: transparent;
        }
        header.scrolled {
            padding: 1rem 0;
            background-color: rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.9);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border-bottom-color: var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            header:not(.scrolled) { padding: 1.5rem 0; }
        }
        .logo-text {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .logo-text { font-size: 1rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .logo-text { font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em; } }

        /* --- BUTTONS --- */
        .btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 2px;
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important; /* Buttons keep mono for UI feel */
            font-weight: 500;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
            position: relative;
        }
        .btn-sm { padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.625rem; }
        .btn-md { padding: 1rem 2rem; font-size: 0.75rem; }
        .btn-lg { padding: 1.25rem 2.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; }
        
        .btn-solid {
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            color: black;
        }
        .btn-solid:hover { background-color: #E5E5E5; }
        
        .btn-outline {
            background-color: transparent;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            border-color: var(--border-color);
        }
        .btn-outline:hover {
            border-color: var(--accent-white);
            background-color: var(--border-color);
        }

        .btn .icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .btn:hover .icon {
            transform: translate(2px, -2px);
        }

        /* --- HERO --- */
        .hero-section {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            position: relative;
        }
        .hero-video-container {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 0;
        }
        .hero-video {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            filter: grayscale(100%);
            opacity: 0.4;
        }
        .hero-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background-color: rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.8);
        }
        .hero-gradient {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(to top, #0F0F12 0%, transparent 50%, rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.5) 100%);
        }
        .hero-content {
            z-index: 10;
            padding-top: 8rem;
            padding-bottom: 5rem;
            text-align: center;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-content { padding-top: 10rem; padding-bottom: 6rem; } }

        .hero-badge {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            max-width: 100%;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .hero-badge { gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } 
        }
        .badge-dot {
            width: 0.375rem;
            height: 0.375rem;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .badge-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; } }
        
        .badge-text {
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important; /* CHANGED from mono */
            color: var(--text-muted);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.025em;
            white-space: normal;
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 1.25;
            font-size: 8px; /* Specific mobile requirement */
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .badge-text { font-size: 9px; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .badge-text { font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5; } }

        /* H1 STYLES - ANIMATED GRADIENT & TYPOGRAPHY */
        h1.hero-title {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.2;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            word-wrap: break-word;
            
            /* Gradient Text Logic */
            background: linear-gradient(
                90deg,
                #FFFFFF 0%,
                #9CA3AF 20%,
                #FFFFFF 40%,
                #FFFFFF 100%
            );
            background-size: 200% auto;
            color: #FFFFFF; /* Fallback */
            background-clip: text;
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            animation: textShine 6s linear infinite;
        }

        /* Mobile specific H1 overrides - Font Smoothing ensured */
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
            h1.hero-title {
                -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
                -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            }
        }

        @keyframes textShine {
            to {
                background-position: 200% center;
            }
        }

        /* UPDATED: THINNER WEIGHTS AS REQUESTED */
        .h1-light {
            font-weight: 300; /* Changed from 200 to 300 (Light) */
        }
        .h1-bold {
            font-weight: 600; /* Changed from 900/700 to 600 (SemiBold) */
        }

        @media (min-width: 640px) { h1.hero-title { font-size: 2.25rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            h1.hero-title { 
                font-size: 3.25rem;
                line-height: 1.1;
                max-width: 900px;
                margin-left: auto;
                margin-right: auto;
            } 
        }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { 
            h1.hero-title { 
                font-size: 4rem;
                max-width: 1100px;
            } 
        }

        .hero-subtitle {
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 9px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            white-space: nowrap; /* Forced single line */
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .hero-subtitle { font-size: 0.75rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } }

        .price-text {
            font-size: 1.125rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .price-text { font-size: 1.25rem; } }

        .social-proof {
            margin-top: 2rem;
            padding-top: 1.5rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 32rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .social-proof { 
                margin-top: 3rem; 
                padding-top: 2rem;
                max-width: 100%; /* Ensure container allows full width */
                /* Removed white-space: nowrap to allow wrapping for long text if needed, while keeping layout cleaner */
                overflow: visible;
            } 
            .social-proof span { display: inline !important; }
        }

        /* --- SECTIONS --- */
        .section {
            padding: 4rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .section { padding: 6rem 0; } }

        .bg-darker { background-color: var(--bg-secondary); }

        .section-tag {
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        .section-title {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.25;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .section-title { font-size: 3rem; } }

        /* --- SERVICES GRID --- */
        .services-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            max-width: 80rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); } }

        .service-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            position: relative;
            min-height: 250px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .service-card { padding: 2rem; min-height: 300px; } }
        .service-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent-white); }
        
        .step-number {
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important;
            font-size: 1.875rem;
            color: var(--border-color);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .step-number { font-size: 2.25rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } }
        .service-card:hover .step-number { color: var(--accent-white); }

        .service-icon {
            position: absolute;
            top: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--border-color);
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .service-icon { top: 2rem; right: 2rem; } }
        .service-card:hover .service-icon { color: var(--accent-white); }
        .service-icon svg {
            transform: rotate(-45deg);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .service-card:hover .service-icon svg { transform: rotate(0); }
        
        /* Typography fix for card headers */
        .service-card h4 { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }

        /* --- BIO SECTION --- */
        .bio-container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 2.5rem;
            max-width: 80rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
            align-items: start;
        }
        /* UPDATED: Adjusted column ratio to make photos smaller on desktop (35% / 65%) */
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .bio-container { grid-template-columns: 0.35fr 0.65fr; gap: 4rem; } }
        
        /* UPDATED BIO COLLAGE: STRICT 2-COL GRID WITH FIXED ASPECT RATIO */
        .bio-collage-container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 8px; /* Gap for both mobile and desktop */
            width: 100%;
        }

        .collage-item {
            position: relative;
            border-radius: 2px;
            overflow: hidden;
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 3/4; /* Forced Aspect Ratio for all items */
        }

        .collage-img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover; /* Cover to fill without distortion */
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            display: block;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }

        /* Casual Labels Styles */
        .casual-label {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 6px;
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            font-style: italic;
            font-size: 11px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            pointer-events: none;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
            z-index: 10;
        }
        
        .label-left {
            left: 6px;
        }
        .label-right {
            right: 6px;
        }

        @media (min-width: 768px) {
             .casual-label { font-size: 12px; bottom: 8px; }
             .label-left { left: 8px; }
             .label-right { right: 8px; }
        }

        /* --- OFFER SECTION --- */
        .offer-wrapper {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-wrapper { border: 1px solid var(--border-color); } }
        
        .offer-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-grid { grid-template-columns: 7fr 5fr; } }
        
        .offer-list-col {
            padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .offer-list-col { padding: 4rem; border-bottom: none; border-right: 1px solid var(--border-color); } 
        }
        
        .offer-price-col {
            padding: 2rem;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-price-col { padding: 4rem; } }
        
        .check-icon-box {
            width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem;
            background-color: var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 2px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            color: white;
        }

        .price-large {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 3.75rem;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .price-large { font-size: 6rem; } }

        /* --- GUARANTEE SECTION --- */
        .guarantee-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 2rem;
            max-width: 64rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .guarantee-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } }
        
        .guarantee-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .guarantee-card { padding: 2.5rem; } }
        
        .glow-effect {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; right: 0;
            width: 8rem; height: 8rem;
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            filter: blur(50px);
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(50%, -50%);
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        .guarantee-card:hover .glow-effect { opacity: 1; }

        /* --- FAQ SECTION --- */
        .faq-container {
            max-width: 48rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        .faq-item {
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        .faq-trigger {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 1.5rem 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: flex-start;
            text-align: left;
            color: var(--text-main);
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-trigger:hover { color: var(--accent-white); }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-trigger { align-items: center; } }
        
        .faq-question {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.25;
            padding-right: 1rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-question { font-size: 1.125rem; } }
        
        .faq-content {
            max-height: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: max-height 0.3s ease, margin-bottom 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-item.active .faq-content {
            max-height: 24rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        .faq-text {
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            padding-right: 1rem;
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-text { padding-right: 2rem; } }

        /* --- FOOTER --- */
        .footer {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            padding-top: 4rem;
            padding-bottom: 3rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer { padding-top: 6rem; } }
        
        .footer-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
            padding-bottom: 3rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 4fr 8fr; gap: 5rem; margin-bottom: 5rem; } 
        }

        .footer-disclaimer {
            font-size: 0.6875rem;
            color: #4B5563;
            line-height: 1.6;
            column-count: 1;
            column-gap: 2rem;
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer-disclaimer { column-count: 2; } }
        .footer-disclaimer p { margin-bottom: 1rem; }

        /* --- ANIMATIONS --- */
        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: .5; }
        }
        @keyframes grow {
            0% { width: 0%; }
            100% { width: 100%; }
        }

        /* --- BACKGROUND NOISE --- */
        .bg-noise {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: -1;
            overflow: hidden;
            pointer-events: none;
            background-image: url('https://www.orfeoai.com/wp-content/themes/orfeoai/images/noise.png');
            opacity: 0.02;
        }

        /* --- MOBILE PADDING FIXES (Max 768px) --- */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            /* Fixes for grids and containers that touch edges on mobile */
            .services-grid, 
            .bio-container, 
            .guarantee-grid, 
            .faq-container {
                padding-left: 1.5rem !important;
                padding-right: 1.5rem !important;
            }

            /* Convert Offer Wrapper to a card with margins on mobile */
            .offer-wrapper {
                margin-left: 1.5rem !important;
                margin-right: 1.5rem !important;
                width: auto !important;
                border: 1px solid var(--border-color) !important;
            }

            /* Ensure Footer container definitely has padding */
            .footer .container {
                padding-left: 1.5rem !important;
                padding-right: 1.5rem !important;
            }
        }

    </style>

                <p class="text-secondary" style="font-size: 0.875rem; margin-top: auto;">Desbloqueas las masterclasses y 14 días de acceso completo. Descubres qué profesión digital encaja contigo.</p>
                <div class="service-icon">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
                </div>

            <!-- Step 2 -->
            <div class="service-card group">
                <div class="step-number">02</div>
                <h4 class="text-white" style="font-size: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Eliges tu profesión y te formas</h4>
                <p class="text-secondary" style="font-size: 0.875rem; margin-top: auto;">
                    Si te gusta conectar con personas → Comercial PRO. Aprendes a cerrar ventas por videollamada.<br><br>
                    Si prefieres algo más analítico → Marketing Digital. Aprendes a gestionar anuncios para negocios.
                </p>
                <div class="service-icon">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Step 3 -->
            <div class="service-card group">
                <div class="step-number">03</div>
                <h4 class="text-white" style="font-size: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Te postulas a trabajos reales</h4>
                <p class="text-secondary" style="font-size: 0.875rem; margin-top: auto;">
                    Empresas nos contactan cada semana buscando perfiles como el tuyo.<br>
                    Una empresa de formación busca comercial → Cobras 1.500€ - 2.500€/mes.<br>
                    Una clínica dental busca gestor de anuncios → Cobras 1.500€/mes fijos por clínica.

                </div>

            <!-- Step 4 -->

    <!-- BIO SECTION -->
    <section id="bio" class="section bg-darker">
        <div class="bio-container">
            
            <!-- Left Column: Title + Photos -->
            <div>
                 <h3 class="text-white uppercase" style="font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; line-height: 1.2;">LA HABILIDAD QUE ME DIO LA LIBERTAD</h3>
                 
                 <!-- NEW COLLAGE LAYOUT: STRICT 2-COL GRID WITH FIXED 3:4 ASPECT RATIO -->
                 <div class="bio-collage-container">
                     <!-- ROW 1 -->
                     <div class="collage-item">
                        <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/fPSTvVgtLrLaVpNFx8ix/media/6992fed51d5e04810f4b1096.jpg" alt="Italia" class="collage-img">
                     </div>
                     <div class="collage-item">
                        <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/fPSTvVgtLrLaVpNFx8ix/media/6992fed26bac244bf3c25764.jpg" alt="Con amigos en Italia" class="collage-img">
                     </div>
                     
                     <!-- ROW 2 -->
                     <div class="collage-item">
                        <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/fPSTvVgtLrLaVpNFx8ix/media/6992fed2a9efde40c49f05f7.jpg" alt="100km en un día" class="collage-img">
                        <span class="casual-label label-left">100km en un día 🏃 ↖</span>
                     </div>
                     <div class="collage-item">
                        <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/fPSTvVgtLrLaVpNFx8ix/media/6992fed26bac245f73c25763.jpg" alt="Bali" class="collage-img">
                     </div>

                     <!-- ROW 3 -->
                     <div class="collage-item">
                        <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/fPSTvVgtLrLaVpNFx8ix/media/6992fed254da04624742c046.jpg" alt="Croacia" class="collage-img">
                     </div>
                     <div class="collage-item">
                        <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/fPSTvVgtLrLaVpNFx8ix/media/6992fed51d5e04eb3f4b1065.jpg" alt="Muay Thai" class="collage-img">
                        <span class="casual-label label-left">Muay Thai 🥊 ↗</span>
                     </div>

                     <!-- ROW 4 -->
                     <div class="collage-item">
                        <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/fPSTvVgtLrLaVpNFx8ix/media/6992fed2a9efded4549f05fc.jpg" alt="Mi madre" class="collage-img">
                        <span class="casual-label label-left">Mi madre ❤️ ↖</span>
                     </div>
                     <div class="collage-item">
                        <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/fPSTvVgtLrLaVpNFx8ix/media/6992fed51d5e045bd14b1078.jpg" alt="Desde pequeño" class="collage-img">
                     </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Right Column: Text -->
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2rem;">
                <div class="text-muted" style="font-weight: 300; font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.7; display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Me llamo Adrián.</p>
                    
                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Y hace unos años estaba jodido. Pero jodido de verdad.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Tenía 21 años. Había pasado 4 años montando negocios que fracasaron. Agencia de marketing. Consultoría. Eventos. Criptomonedas.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Había vuelto a casa de mi madre. La había dejado con la novia. Y tenía una deuda de 4.000€ que no sabía cómo coño iba a pagar.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Vengo de una familia de clase baja. Mi madre limpiaba casas. Mi padre era camarero. Nunca tuvimos casa en propiedad. El coche era un Opel Corsa heredado de mi abuelo.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Y nadie —absolutamente nadie— me enseñó cómo funcionaba el dinero.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Pero yo siempre supe que quería algo más.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">El problema era que no tenía ni puta idea de cómo llegar ahí.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Entonces descubrí las profesiones digitales.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Tenía un amigo que trabajaba de esto. Ganaba muy bien. Desde casa. Sin jefes.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Y pensé: "Aquí puedo aprender una habilidad que se paga bien, meterme en una empresa en días, y empezar a cobrar. Sin montar nada. Sin riesgo."</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Aprendes. Das el servicio. Te pagan.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Dejé el trabajo en diciembre. En enero gané 4.000€.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Casi 4 veces más de lo que ganaba. En 30 días. Desde casa.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">No porque fuera especial. Sino porque tenía una habilidad que el mercado pagaba bien.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Hoy vivo en Dubai. Tiro una piedra desde mi terraza y llega al mar.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Entreno cuando quiero. Como fuera todos los días. Me fui 48 horas a España al bautizo de mi primita. Ida y vuelta. He llevado a mi madre a Roma y a Praga.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Yo decido qué hago. Y luego diseño mi día alrededor de eso.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">No te voy a prometer que te vas a hacer millonario.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Pero sí te puedo decir lo que me pasó a mí:</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Pasé de 1.150€ al mes en una inmobiliaria a 4.000€ desde casa. En 30 días.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Y ese cambio —pasar de un sueldo que no controlas a ganar el doble o el triple desde tu casa, sin fichar— es el cambio de paradigma más grande que he vivido.</p>

                    <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">No fue hacerme rico.</p>

                </button>
                <div class="faq-content">
                    <p class="faq-text">Sí. No tendría sentido montar esto si no lo fuera. Empresas nos contactan cada semana buscando perfiles que no encuentran en ningún lado. Comerciales, marketers, gente de tech, IA, etc. Son ofertas reales de empresas reales.</p>

                    <!-- CHANGED: removed font-mono -->
                    <div style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-secondary); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem;">
                        <p>¿Tienes dudas?</p>
                        <p class="text-white">+34 623 600 094</p>
                        <p class="text-white">hola@capitalhub.com</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <!-- CHANGED: removed font-mono -->
                    <h5 class="text-secondary uppercase" style="font-size: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Sobre lo que ofrecemos</h5>
                    <div class="footer-disclaimer">
                        <p>Capital Hub es una plataforma de formación en profesiones digitales con acceso a una bolsa de empleo real. Todo nuestro contenido tiene fines educativos e informativos.</p>
                        <p>Los resultados que puedas obtener dependen de muchos factores: tu punto de partida, tu dedicación, el tiempo que inviertas y tu capacidad de aplicar lo aprendido. Por eso, aunque ponemos todo de nuestra parte para darte las mejores herramientas, no podemos prometer resultados específicos ni ingresos concretos. Cada persona es diferente y cada camino también.</p>
                        <p>Las cifras que mencionamos en esta página son ejemplos reales pero ilustrativos. Sirven para que entiendas el potencial del mercado, no como garantía de lo que tú vas a ganar.</p>
                        <p>Lo que sí te garantizamos es la calidad de la formación. Si accedes al contenido y no estás satisfecho, tienes 30 días para pedir un reembolso completo. Sin complicaciones.</p>
                        <p>Los testimonios que aparecen reflejan experiencias de personas reales, pero son individuales. Lo que a ellos les funcionó puede no ser exactamente igual para ti.</p>
                        <p>Nada de lo que encuentres aquí sustituye el asesoramiento de un profesional legal, fiscal o financiero. Antes de tomar decisiones importantes, consulta con quien corresponda.</p>
                        <p>Al registrarte en Capital Hub, aceptas que las decisiones que tomes y los resultados que obtengas son tu responsabilidad.</p>

                    </div>
                </div>

                <div style="display: flex; gap: 1rem;">
                    <span>Copyright 2025</span>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#" style="transition: color 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.color='white'" onmouseout="this.style.color='inherit'">Política de Privacidad</a>
                </div>
            </div>
            <style>
                @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer div:last-child { flex-direction: row; } }
            </style>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <script>
        // --- LOADER LOGIC ---
        window.addEventListener('load', () => {
            const loader = document.getElementById('loader');
            // Ensure loader stays for at least 1s as per original design
            setTimeout(() => {
                loader.style.opacity = '0';
                setTimeout(() => {
                    loader.style.display = 'none';
                }, 500);
            }, 1000);
        });

        // --- CUSTOM CURSOR LOGIC ---
        const cursor = document.getElementById('custom-cursor');
        const cursorDot = document.getElementById('cursor-dot');
        const isMobile = /Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent);

        if (!isMobile) {
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                cursor.style.transform = `translate3d(${e.clientX}px, ${e.clientY}px, 0)`;
            });

            document.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => cursor.style.opacity = '1');
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => cursor.style.opacity = '0');

            document.addEventListener('mousedown', () => cursorDot.classList.add('clicked'));
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => cursorDot.classList.remove('clicked'));
        }

        // --- HEADER SCROLL LOGIC ---
        const header = document.getElementById('main-header');
        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            if (window.scrollY > 50) {
                header.classList.add('scrolled');
            } else {
                header.classList.remove('scrolled');
            }
        });

        // --- FAQ TOGGLE LOGIC ---
        const faqItems = document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item');
        faqItems.forEach(item => {
            const trigger = item.querySelector('.faq-trigger');
            const iconPlus = item.querySelector('.icon-plus');
            const iconMinus = item.querySelector('.icon-minus');

            trigger.addEventListener('click', () => {
                // Toggle active class
                item.classList.toggle('active');
                
                // Toggle icons
                if (item.classList.contains('active')) {
                    iconPlus.classList.add('hidden');
                    iconMinus.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    iconPlus.classList.remove('hidden');
                    iconMinus.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>

TRABAJO SOBRE LANDING PARA GOHIGHLEVEL

REGLAS INNEGOCIABLES:
- Actualiza ÚNICAMENTE el archivo index.html.
- NO devuelvas el código dentro del chat.
- Muestra el resultado renderizado en el panel de preview.
- Entrega el archivo final como botón/pestaña "index.html" en la parte inferior.
- NO cambiar NI UNA SOLA LETRA del copy. El texto debe aparecer EXACTAMENTE como está ahora.
- Mantén animaciones y dinámicas existentes.

CAMBIOS A REALIZAR (SOLO ESTOS):

1. SECCIÓN BIO — REDISEÑAR LA PRESENTACIÓN VISUAL DEL TEXTO:
El texto de la historia de Adrián actualmente se ve plano, monótono y difícil de leer. Todos los párrafos tienen el mismo tamaño, mismo color y mismo peso. Necesito que se vea BRUTAL, dinámico y que sea un placer leerlo.

SIN CAMBIAR NI UNA LETRA DEL COPY, aplica estos cambios visuales:

ESTRUCTURA GENERAL:
- El texto debe ocupar TODO el ancho de la página (no solo la columna derecha). Las fotos quedan arriba con el título, y debajo viene el texto a ancho completo.
- Esto le da al texto el espacio que necesita para respirar y verse impactante.

JERARQUÍA VISUAL CON TAMAÑOS DE TEXTO:
- Las frases cortas e impactantes (las que tienen 1 sola línea o son muy breves) deben tener un font-size MÁS GRANDE que el resto (entre 24px y 32px en desktop), color blanco puro (#FFFFFF), font-weight 500.
- Los párrafos narrativos más largos (los que tienen 2 o más líneas) deben tener font-size normal (16-17px), color gris claro (#9CA3AF), font-weight 300.
- Esto crea un ritmo visual donde las frases de impacto SALTAN a la vista y los párrafos narrativos fluyen suave entre ellas.

FRASES QUE DEBEN SER GRANDES (por su posición en el texto, son las frases cortas de 1 línea):
- "Me llamo Adrián."
- "Y hace unos años estaba jodido. Pero jodido de verdad."
- "Y nadie —absolutamente nadie— me enseñó cómo funcionaba el dinero."
- "Pero yo siempre supe que quería algo más."
- "El problema era que no tenía ni puta idea de cómo llegar ahí."
- "Entonces descubrí las profesiones digitales."
- "Aprendes. Das el servicio. Te pagan."
- "Dejé el trabajo en diciembre. En enero gané 4.000€."
- "Casi 4 veces más de lo que ganaba. En 30 días. Desde casa."
- "Yo decido qué hago. Y luego diseño mi día alrededor de eso."
- "No te voy a prometer que te vas a hacer millonario."
- "No fue hacerme rico."
- "Fue dejar de depender."

TODO EL RESTO del texto: tamaño normal, gris claro, peso ligero.

ESPACIADO:
- Mínimo 2rem de espacio entre cada párrafo.
- Las frases grandes deben tener aún más espacio arriba y abajo (3rem) para que respiren.

SEPARADORES VISUALES:
- Añadir una línea horizontal fina (1px, color #2A2D34) entre estas transiciones del texto para marcar los "actos" de la historia:
  • Después de "El problema era que no tenía ni puta idea de cómo llegar ahí." (fin del problema)
  • Después de "Casi 4 veces más de lo que ganaba. En 30 días. Desde casa." (fin de la transformación)
  • Antes de "No te voy a prometer que te vas a hacer millonario." (inicio del cierre)

LOS 3 PUNTOS FINALES:
Los últimos 3 puntos ("Dejar de depender...", "Aprender una habilidad...", "Empezar a diseñar...") deben presentarse como una lista visual con:
- Una flecha → delante de cada punto.
- Color blanco, font-weight 500, font-size 18px.
- Espacio entre cada punto.

MOBILE:
- Las frases grandes se reducen a 20-22px pero mantienen el contraste visual con el texto normal.
- El espaciado se reduce proporcionalmente pero sigue siendo generoso.
- Padding lateral de 20px.

REPITO: NO CAMBIAR NI UNA LETRA DEL TEXTO. Solo cambiar la presentación visual.

ENTREGA:
Devuélveme:
1) El archivo index.html actualizado como botón/pestaña.
2) El resultado renderizado en el preview.
3) Un resumen breve de los cambios aplicados.

**Considering Bio Layout**

I'm currently focused on redesigning the "Bio" section within `index.html`. My primary goal is to enhance the text's visual appeal, but I'm maintaining the existing content. The first priority is adjusting the layout to make the text span the container's full width, rather than being confined to the right side.


**Analyzing New Layout**

I've been analyzing the feedback and the current structure. I'm restructuring the bio section, aiming for a cleaner layout. My plan involves a container for the title and photos, followed by another container for the text, spanning the full width. I'm focusing on ensuring the text flows smoothly and is visually appealing as requested. Also considering visual hierarchy as per feedback and spacing requirements.


**Planning HTML Structure**

I'm now focused on planning the structural HTML changes for the bio section. My goal is to incorporate horizontal separators at specified points within the text, and visual lists with arrows for the final three points. I'm also planning mobile adjustments, and spacing, ensuring a responsive design. I will start by modifying the text paragraphs to provide spacing between large sentences.


**Implementing New Layout**

I'm now implementing the new layout within the `<section id="bio">`. I've added a centered container for improved readability. The header section, including title and photos, is coming along. I've retained the grid layout for the photos, while experimenting with width restrictions to balance the "full width" text requirement. I am planning a mobile-first approach, and ensuring responsiveness.


**Refining Text Formatting**

I'm now refining the text formatting within the "bio-story-content" div. I've focused on applying "text-large" and "text-normal" classes to paragraphs, based on the content. The aim is to create visual hierarchy. I'm prioritizing clear readability within a full-width container. I am making this mobile-friendly, adjusting margins.


**Evaluating Paragraph Styles**

I'm now evaluating the newly added paragraphs and refining their formatting within the bio content. I am applying "text-large" for key statements and "text-normal" for supporting details to improve readability. I'm focusing on text flow and visual impact within the updated layout, and making it mobile-friendly. I'm also ensuring the paragraphs align with the content's tone and intent.


**Assessing Story Flow**

I'm now focusing on assessing the flow and impact of this updated content. I'm considering the structure and narrative arc within these new paragraphs. My goal is to determine if the story conveys a compelling journey, and if the points made are clear and easily understood, aiming for improved readability. I'm focusing on the impact of "text-large" for impact and "text-normal" for details.


**Defining Key Outcomes**

I'm now defining the key outcomes from my recent progress. The core shift, going from an uncontrollable salary to doubling or tripling income working from home, is the biggest paradigm shift I've experienced. I'm emphasizing that this isn't about getting rich, but rather achieving independence. I'm focusing on the impact of being able to design a flexible lifestyle, on your own terms. I'm now aiming at providing actionable steps.


**Styling Bio Content**

I'm now focusing on implementing specific styles within the "bio-story-content" div. I've defined font sizes, weights, colors, and line heights for paragraphs using `.text-large` and `.text-normal` classes, with responsive adjustments. I've also incorporated a horizontal divider (`.story-divider`) for visual separation, and styles for the final list (`.final-list`) with custom bullets. I've also set a max-width for readability, left-aligning the text.


**Adjusting Text Content**

I'm now focusing on formatting and styling the bio content's sentences. I'm carefully identifying sentences for large text based on context. "Me llamo Adrián," and "Y hace unos años estaba jodido. Pero jodido de verdad." are obvious large sentences. I'm also ensuring the correct list of large sentences: "Y nadie —absolutamente nadie— me enseñó cómo funcionaba el dinero." and "Pero yo siempre supe que quería algo más.".


**Refining Paragraph Placement**

I'm now refining the placement of specific paragraphs within the "bio-story-content" div. I'm focusing on text formatting by classifying the sentences based on context, and applying classes like "text-large" and "text-normal". I've correctly identified sentences for large formatting. The aim is to create visual impact for key statements, and improve readability. I'm also ensuring the correct list of sentences and their styles.


**Updating CSS Styling**

I'm now focused on CSS updates to support the bio section's layout change. I'm removing the desktop grid properties from `.bio-container` and replacing them with a flexbox layout, centered, and stacking content vertically. I'm also planning to update the `.bio-collage-container` to maintain the collage layout, ensuring a responsive design. My goal is a streamlined, more flexible bio section, easily adapted.


**Modifying Collage Width**

I'm now modifying the photo collage's width. I'll center the photo grid and limit its width to enhance visual appeal above the text, as suggested. I'm also preparing for the implementation of new classes like `bio-text-large`, `bio-text-normal`, `bio-divider`, and `bio-list` for a more structured and visually appealing layout. Plus, I'm re-reviewing "large sentences" selection.


**Implementing HTML Elements**

I'm now implementing the identified large sentences and adding the horizontal separators to the HTML. I'm focusing on ensuring proper class application (`text-large`, `text-normal`) and correct placement of the horizontal dividers. I'm also ensuring that the new `bio-story-content` is responsive. Finally, I've considered that the collage goes above the text, and should likely be full-width.


**Refining Page Layout**

I'm now refining the page layout, based on feedback. I'm centering the photo grid with a max-width, around 800px. I've decided on 900px for the content container, to keep everything neat and readable, aligning it with the text container. I'm focusing on CSS updates, adding specific classes for bio typography to avoid conflicts elsewhere. My goal is an improved visual hierarchy.


**Defining CSS Properties**

I'm now defining the specific CSS properties for the `bio-text-large` and `bio-text-normal` classes, as well as the overall structure. The large text will use serif for impact, while normal text remains sans-serif for readability. I'm setting mobile and desktop font sizes, line heights, and weights for both. I'm also ensuring a consistent visual hierarchy.


**Refining Typeface Usage**

I'm now refining the typeface use in the bio. I'm considering using `Inter Tight` for the impactful large sentences, matching the design, and keeping `Inter` for normal paragraphs, per site style. This provides visual variety. I'm evaluating `Inter Tight` to see if it fits, or if `Inter` alone is sufficient for the whole section.


**Evaluating Font Hierarchy**

I'm now assessing how to best use the defined fonts. Using `var(--font-serif)` for large sentences, and `var(--font-main)` for normal sentences, creates a great visual hierarchy, with an "editorial" feel, fitting the "Brutal" description. It is important to emphasize that this provides the "editorial" or "Brutal" feel that was requested.


**Centering and Button Placement**

I'm now focusing on centering the photo collage, setting a max width of 800px and making the button "EMPEZAR AHORA" centered at the end of the text container. I'm updating the `bio-collage-container` to maintain the photo grid, and adding the button within the `bio-story-content` div.

El siguiente código actualiza el archivo `index.html`.

**Resumen de cambios:**
1.  **Rediseño Estructural de la Sección Bio:** Se ha eliminado la disposición de dos columnas (grid). Ahora la sección tiene un flujo vertical centrado: Título → Grid de Fotos (centrado y limitado en anchura) → Texto de la historia (ancho completo en contenedor de lectura).
2.  **Jerarquía Visual del Texto:** Se han implementado clases CSS específicas (`bio-text-large` y `bio-text-normal`) para diferenciar visualmente las frases de impacto (fuente Serif, mayor tamaño, blanco, peso medio) de los párrafos narrativos (fuente Sans, tamaño normal, gris claro, peso ligero), creando un ritmo de lectura dinámico.
3.  **Separadores y Espaciado:** Se han añadido líneas divisorias (`hr`) en los puntos exactos de la historia indicados y se ha aumentado significativamente el espaciado entre párrafos para mejorar la legibilidad ("respiración").
4.  **Lista Final:** Los tres puntos finales se han estilizado como una lista visual con flechas (`→`) y mayor peso visual.
5.  **Grid de Fotos:** Se mantiene el grid de 2 columnas con aspect-ratio 3:4, pero ahora está centrado encima del texto con un ancho máximo controlado para que no domine excesivamente en desktop.

entries.description: Redesign Bio section for better visual storytelling: stack layout, dynamic typography sizes, visual separators, and strict adherence to provided copy.

diffs.replacement:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Capital Hub</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <!-- Updated Fonts: Ensure weights 300 and 600 are available for Inter Tight -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter+Tight:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700;900&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* --- VARIABLES & RESET --- */
        :root {
            --bg-main: #0F0F12;
            --bg-card: #18181B;
            --bg-secondary: #111113;
            --border-color: #2A2D34;
            --text-main: #F5F6F7;
            --text-secondary: #6B7280;
            --text-muted: #9CA3AF;
            --accent-white: #FFFFFF;
            --font-main: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            --font-serif: 'Inter Tight', sans-serif;
            --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; /* Prevent font scaling in landscape on iOS */
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            overflow-x: hidden;
            line-height: 1.5;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            margin: 0; /* Reset body margin for GHL compatibility */
        }

        /* --- TYPOGRAPHY --- */
        h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 500; /* Default medium */
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        p, li, a, span, div, button, input, label {
            font-family: var(--font-main);
        }
        
        /* Exception for Headlines override */
        .title-font { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }

        a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: inherit;
        }

        button {
            border: none;
            background: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        .font-mono { font-family: var(--font-mono) !important; }
        .font-serif { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }
        .uppercase { text-transform: uppercase; }
        .text-center { text-align: center; }
        
        /* --- UTILITIES --- */
        .container {
            width: 100%;
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            padding-right: 1.5rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .container { max-width: 640px; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .container { max-width: 768px; padding-left: 2rem; padding-right: 2rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { .container { max-width: 1024px; } }
        @media (min-width: 1280px) { .container { max-width: 1280px; } }

        .flex { display: flex; }
        .flex-col { flex-direction: column; }
        .items-center { align-items: center; }
        .justify-center { justify-content: center; }
        .justify-between { justify-content: space-between; }
        .gap-2 { gap: 0.5rem; }
        .gap-3 { gap: 0.75rem; }
        .gap-4 { gap: 1rem; }
        .gap-6 { gap: 1.5rem; }
        .gap-8 { gap: 2rem; }
        .w-full { width: 100%; }
        .relative { position: relative; }
        .absolute { position: absolute; }
        .inset-0 { top: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; left: 0; }
        .z-10 { z-index: 10; }
        .z-20 { z-index: 20; }
        .hidden { display: none; }

        /* --- SELECTION --- */
        ::selection {
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            color: var(--bg-main);
        }

        /* --- LOADING SCREEN --- */
        #loader {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
        }
        .loader-content h2 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            animation: pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .loader-content h2 { font-size: 2.25rem; }
        }
        .loader-bar-container {
            width: 8rem;
            height: 1px;
            background-color: var(--border-color);
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-top: 1rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .loader-bar-container { width: 12rem; } }
        .loader-bar {
            height: 100%;
            width: 100%;
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            transform-origin: left;
            animation: grow 1.5s ease-in-out forwards;
        }

        /* --- CUSTOM CURSOR --- */
        #custom-cursor {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 9999;
            mix-blend-mode: difference;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            opacity: 0;
        }
        #cursor-dot {
            width: 0.75rem;
            height: 0.75rem;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
            transition: transform 0.2s ease-out;
        }
        #cursor-dot.clicked {
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.5);
        }
        @media (hover: none) and (pointer: coarse) {
            #custom-cursor { display: none !important; }
            body { cursor: auto; }
        }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) {
            body { cursor: none; }
        }

        /* --- HEADER --- */
        header {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%;
            z-index: 40;
            padding: 1rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: all 0.5s ease;
            background-color: transparent;
        }
        header.scrolled {
            padding: 1rem 0;
            background-color: rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.9);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border-bottom-color: var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            header:not(.scrolled) { padding: 1.5rem 0; }
        }
        .logo-text {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .logo-text { font-size: 1rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .logo-text { font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em; } }

        /* --- BUTTONS --- */
        .btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 2px;
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important; /* Buttons keep mono for UI feel */
            font-weight: 500;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
            position: relative;
        }
        .btn-sm { padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.625rem; }
        .btn-md { padding: 1rem 2rem; font-size: 0.75rem; }
        .btn-lg { padding: 1.25rem 2.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; }
        
        .btn-solid {
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            color: black;
        }
        .btn-solid:hover { background-color: #E5E5E5; }
        
        .btn-outline {
            background-color: transparent;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            border-color: var(--border-color);
        }
        .btn-outline:hover {
            border-color: var(--accent-white);
            background-color: var(--border-color);
        }

        .btn .icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .btn:hover .icon {
            transform: translate(2px, -2px);
        }

        /* --- HERO --- */
        .hero-section {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            position: relative;
        }
        .hero-video-container {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 0;
        }
        .hero-video {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            filter: grayscale(100%);
            opacity: 0.4;
        }
        .hero-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background-color: rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.8);
        }
        .hero-gradient {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(to top, #0F0F12 0%, transparent 50%, rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.5) 100%);
        }
        .hero-content {
            z-index: 10;
            padding-top: 8rem;
            padding-bottom: 5rem;
            text-align: center;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-content { padding-top: 10rem; padding-bottom: 6rem; } }

        .hero-badge {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            max-width: 100%;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .hero-badge { gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } 
        }
        .badge-dot {
            width: 0.375rem;
            height: 0.375rem;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .badge-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; } }
        
        .badge-text {
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important; /* CHANGED from mono */
            color: var(--text-muted);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.025em;
            white-space: normal;
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 1.25;
            font-size: 8px; /* Specific mobile requirement */
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .badge-text { font-size: 9px; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .badge-text { font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5; } }

        /* H1 STYLES - ANIMATED GRADIENT & TYPOGRAPHY */
        h1.hero-title {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.2;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            word-wrap: break-word;
            
            /* Gradient Text Logic */
            background: linear-gradient(
                90deg,
                #FFFFFF 0%,
                #9CA3AF 20%,
                #FFFFFF 40%,
                #FFFFFF 100%
            );
            background-size: 200% auto;
            color: #FFFFFF; /* Fallback */
            background-clip: text;
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            animation: textShine 6s linear infinite;
        }

        /* Mobile specific H1 overrides - Font Smoothing ensured */
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
            h1.hero-title {
                -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
                -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            }
        }

        @keyframes textShine {
            to {
                background-position: 200% center;
            }
        }

        /* UPDATED: THINNER WEIGHTS AS REQUESTED */
        .h1-light {
            font-weight: 300; /* Changed from 200 to 300 (Light) */
        }
        .h1-bold {
            font-weight: 600; /* Changed from 900/700 to 600 (SemiBold) */
        }

        @media (min-width: 640px) { h1.hero-title { font-size: 2.25rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            h1.hero-title { 
                font-size: 3.25rem;
                line-height: 1.1;
                max-width: 900px;
                margin-left: auto;
                margin-right: auto;
            } 
        }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { 
            h1.hero-title { 
                font-size: 4rem;
                max-width: 1100px;
            } 
        }

        .hero-subtitle {
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 9px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            white-space: nowrap; /* Forced single line */
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .hero-subtitle { font-size: 0.75rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } }

        .price-text {
            font-size: 1.125rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .price-text { font-size: 1.25rem; } }

        .social-proof {
            margin-top: 2rem;
            padding-top: 1.5rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 32rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .social-proof { 
                margin-top: 3rem; 
                padding-top: 2rem;
                max-width: 100%; /* Ensure container allows full width */
                /* Removed white-space: nowrap to allow wrapping for long text if needed, while keeping layout cleaner */
                overflow: visible;
            } 
            .social-proof span { display: inline !important; }
        }

        /* --- SECTIONS --- */
        .section {
            padding: 4rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .section { padding: 6rem 0; } }

        .bg-darker { background-color: var(--bg-secondary); }

        .section-tag {
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        .section-title {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.25;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .section-title { font-size: 3rem; } }

        /* --- SERVICES GRID --- */
        .services-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            max-width: 80rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); } }

        .service-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            position: relative;
            min-height: 250px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .service-card { padding: 2rem; min-height: 300px; } }
        .service-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent-white); }
        
        .step-number {
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important;
            font-size: 1.875rem;
            color: var(--border-color);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .step-number { font-size: 2.25rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } }
        .service-card:hover .step-number { color: var(--accent-white); }

        .service-icon {
            position: absolute;
            top: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--border-color);
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .service-icon { top: 2rem; right: 2rem; } }
        .service-card:hover .service-icon { color: var(--accent-white); }
        .service-icon svg {
            transform: rotate(-45deg);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .service-card:hover .service-icon svg { transform: rotate(0); }
        
        /* Typography fix for card headers */
        .service-card h4 { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }

        /* --- BIO SECTION STYLES --- */
        .bio-container {
            /* Restructured to flex column for stacking layout */
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 2.5rem;
            width: 100%;
            margin: 0 auto;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .bio-collage-container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 8px; /* Gap for both mobile and desktop */
            width: 100%;
        }

        .collage-item {
            position: relative;
            border-radius: 2px;
            overflow: hidden;
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 3/4; /* Forced Aspect Ratio for all items */
        }

        .collage-img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover; /* Cover to fill without distortion */
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            display: block;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }

        /* Bio Typography Classes */
        .bio-text-large {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1.375rem; /* ~22px Mobile */
            line-height: 1.4;
            color: #FFFFFF;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .bio-text-large {
                font-size: 1.75rem; /* 28px Desktop */
                margin-bottom: 3rem;
            }
        }

        .bio-text-normal {
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            font-size: 1rem; /* 16px */

            color: #9CA3AF;
            font-weight: 300;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .bio-text-normal {
                font-size: 1.125rem; /* 18px */
                margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
            }
        }

        .bio-divider {
            border: 0;
            border-top: 1px solid #2A2D34;
            margin: 2rem 0;
            width: 100%;
            opacity: 0.5;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .bio-divider { margin: 4rem 0; }
        }

        .bio-list {
            list-style: none;
            padding: 0;
            margin: 2rem 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 1.5rem;
        }
        .bio-list-item {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1rem;
            align-items: flex-start;
            color: #FFFFFF;
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 1.125rem; /* 18px */
            line-height: 1.5;
            font-family: var(--font-main);

        .bio-arrow {
            color: #FFFFFF;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        /* Casual Labels Styles */
        .casual-label {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 6px;
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            font-style: italic;
            font-size: 11px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);

            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            pointer-events: none;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
