El siguiente código actualiza el archivo `index.html`.

**Resumen de cambios:**
1.  **Ajuste de espaciado en Desktop (Bio):** Se han añadido overrides de CSS dentro de un media query `@media (min-width: 1024px)` para reducir significativamente los márgenes verticales y el tamaño de fuente de los elementos de texto en la sección de biografía. Esto equilibra la altura de la columna de texto con la columna de imágenes.
2.  **Clase para contenedor del botón:** Se ha reemplazado el estilo en línea `margin-top: 4rem` del contenedor del botón de la biografía por una clase CSS `.bio-btn-container`. Esta clase mantiene el margen de 4rem en móvil pero lo reduce a 2rem en desktop.
3.  **Reducción de huecos:** Se ha reducido el `gap` de la lista de beneficios y los márgenes de los separadores (`hr`) específicamente para la vista de escritorio.

entries.description: Update Bio section CSS to compact spacing on desktop (1024px+) matching text height with photos.

diffs.replacement:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Capital Hub</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <!-- Updated Fonts: Ensure weights 300 and 600 are available for Inter Tight -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter+Tight:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700;900&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* --- VARIABLES & RESET --- */
        :root {
            --bg-main: #0F0F12;
            --bg-card: #18181B;
            --bg-secondary: #111113;
            --border-color: #2A2D34;
            --text-main: #F5F6F7;
            --text-secondary: #6B7280;
            --text-muted: #9CA3AF;
            --accent-white: #FFFFFF;
            --font-main: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            --font-serif: 'Inter Tight', sans-serif;
            --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; /* Prevent font scaling in landscape on iOS */
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            overflow-x: hidden;
            line-height: 1.5;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            margin: 0; /* Reset body margin for GHL compatibility */
        }

        /* --- TYPOGRAPHY --- */
        h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 500; /* Default medium */
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        p, li, a, span, div, button, input, label {
            font-family: var(--font-main);
        }
        
        /* Exception for Headlines override */
        .title-font { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }

        a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: inherit;
        }

        button {
            border: none;
            background: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        .font-mono { font-family: var(--font-mono) !important; }
        .font-serif { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }
        .uppercase { text-transform: uppercase; }
        .text-center { text-align: center; }
        
        /* --- UTILITIES --- */
        .container {
            width: 100%;
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            padding-right: 1.5rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .container { max-width: 640px; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .container { max-width: 768px; padding-left: 2rem; padding-right: 2rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { .container { max-width: 1024px; } }
        @media (min-width: 1280px) { .container { max-width: 1280px; } }

        .flex { display: flex; }
        .flex-col { flex-direction: column; }
        .items-center { align-items: center; }
        .justify-center { justify-content: center; }
        .justify-between { justify-content: space-between; }
        .gap-2 { gap: 0.5rem; }
        .gap-3 { gap: 0.75rem; }
        .gap-4 { gap: 1rem; }
        .gap-6 { gap: 1.5rem; }
        .gap-8 { gap: 2rem; }
        .w-full { width: 100%; }
        .relative { position: relative; }
        .absolute { position: absolute; }
        .inset-0 { top: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; left: 0; }
        .z-10 { z-index: 10; }
        .z-20 { z-index: 20; }
        .hidden { display: none; }

        /* --- SELECTION --- */
        ::selection {
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            color: var(--bg-main);
        }

        /* --- LOADING SCREEN --- */
        #loader {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
        }
        .loader-content h2 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            animation: pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .loader-content h2 { font-size: 2.25rem; }
        }
        .loader-bar-container {
            width: 8rem;
            height: 1px;
            background-color: var(--border-color);
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-top: 1rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .loader-bar-container { width: 12rem; } }
        .loader-bar {
            height: 100%;
            width: 100%;
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            transform-origin: left;
            animation: grow 1.5s ease-in-out forwards;
        }

        /* --- CUSTOM CURSOR --- */
        #custom-cursor {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 9999;
            mix-blend-mode: difference;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            opacity: 0;
        }
        #cursor-dot {
            width: 0.75rem;
            height: 0.75rem;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
            transition: transform 0.2s ease-out;
        }
        #cursor-dot.clicked {
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.5);
        }
        @media (hover: none) and (pointer: coarse) {
            #custom-cursor { display: none !important; }
            body { cursor: auto; }
        }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) {
            body { cursor: none; }
        }

        /* --- HEADER --- */
        header {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%;
            z-index: 40;
            padding: 1rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: all 0.5s ease;
            background-color: transparent;
        }
        header.scrolled {
            padding: 1rem 0;
            background-color: rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.9);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border-bottom-color: var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            header:not(.scrolled) { padding: 1.5rem 0; }
        }
        .logo-text {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .logo-text { font-size: 1rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .logo-text { font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em; } }

        /* --- BUTTONS --- */
        .btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 2px;
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important; /* Buttons keep mono for UI feel */
            font-weight: 500;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
            position: relative;
        }
        .btn-sm { padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.625rem; }
        .btn-md { padding: 1rem 2rem; font-size: 0.75rem; }
        .btn-lg { padding: 1.25rem 2.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; }
        
        .btn-solid {
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            color: black;
        }
        .btn-solid:hover { background-color: #E5E5E5; }
        
        .btn-outline {
            background-color: transparent;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            border-color: var(--border-color);
        }
        .btn-outline:hover {
            border-color: var(--accent-white);
            background-color: var(--border-color);
        }

        .btn .icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .btn:hover .icon {
            transform: translate(2px, -2px);
        }

        /* --- HERO --- */
        .hero-section {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            position: relative;
        }
        .hero-video-container {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 0;
        }
        .hero-video {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            filter: grayscale(100%);
            opacity: 0.4;
        }
        .hero-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background-color: rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.8);
        }
        .hero-gradient {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(to top, #0F0F12 0%, transparent 50%, rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.5) 100%);
        }
        .hero-content {
            z-index: 10;
            padding-top: 8rem;
            padding-bottom: 5rem;
            text-align: center;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-content { padding-top: 10rem; padding-bottom: 6rem; } }

        .hero-badge {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            max-width: 100%;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .hero-badge { gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } 
        }
        .badge-dot {
            width: 0.375rem;
            height: 0.375rem;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .badge-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; } }
        
        .badge-text {
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important; /* CHANGED from mono */
            color: var(--text-muted);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.025em;
            white-space: normal;
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 1.25;
            font-size: 8px; /* Specific mobile requirement */
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .badge-text { font-size: 9px; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .badge-text { font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5; } }

        /* H1 STYLES - ANIMATED GRADIENT & TYPOGRAPHY */
        h1.hero-title {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.2;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            word-wrap: break-word;
            
            /* Gradient Text Logic */
            background: linear-gradient(
                90deg,
                #FFFFFF 0%,
                #9CA3AF 20%,
                #FFFFFF 40%,
                #FFFFFF 100%
            );
            background-size: 200% auto;
            color: #FFFFFF; /* Fallback */
            background-clip: text;
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            animation: textShine 6s linear infinite;
        }

        /* Mobile specific H1 overrides - Font Smoothing ensured */
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
            h1.hero-title {
                -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
                -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            }
        }

        @keyframes textShine {
            to {
                background-position: 200% center;
            }
        }

        /* UPDATED: THINNER WEIGHTS AS REQUESTED */
        .h1-light {
            font-weight: 300; /* Changed from 200 to 300 (Light) */
        }
        .h1-bold {
            font-weight: 600; /* Changed from 900/700 to 600 (SemiBold) */
        }

        @media (min-width: 640px) { h1.hero-title { font-size: 2.25rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            h1.hero-title { 
                font-size: 3.25rem;
                line-height: 1.1;
                max-width: 900px;
                margin-left: auto;
                margin-right: auto;
            } 
        }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { 
            h1.hero-title { 
                font-size: 4rem;
                max-width: 1100px;
            } 
        }

        .hero-subtitle {
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 9px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            white-space: nowrap; /* Forced single line */
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .hero-subtitle { font-size: 0.75rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } }

        .price-text {
            font-size: 1.125rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .price-text { font-size: 1.25rem; } }

        .social-proof {
            margin-top: 2rem;
            padding-top: 1.5rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 32rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .social-proof { 
                margin-top: 3rem; 
                padding-top: 2rem;
                max-width: 100%; /* Ensure container allows full width */
                /* Removed white-space: nowrap to allow wrapping for long text if needed, while keeping layout cleaner */
                overflow: visible;
            } 
            .social-proof span { display: inline !important; }
        }

        /* --- SECTIONS --- */
        .section {
            padding: 4rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .section { padding: 6rem 0; } }

        .bg-darker { background-color: var(--bg-secondary); }

        .section-tag {
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        .section-title {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.25;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .section-title { font-size: 3rem; } }

        /* --- SERVICES GRID --- */
        .services-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            max-width: 80rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); } }

        .service-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            position: relative;
            min-height: 250px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .service-card { padding: 2rem; min-height: 300px; } }
        .service-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent-white); }
        
        .step-number {
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important;
            font-size: 1.875rem;
            color: var(--border-color);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .step-number { font-size: 2.25rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } }
        .service-card:hover .step-number { color: var(--accent-white); }

        .service-icon {
            position: absolute;
            top: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--border-color);
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .service-icon { top: 2rem; right: 2rem; } }
        .service-card:hover .service-icon { color: var(--accent-white); }
        .service-icon svg {
            transform: rotate(-45deg);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .service-card:hover .service-icon svg { transform: rotate(0); }
        
        /* Typography fix for card headers */
        .service-card h4 { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }

        /* --- BIO SECTION STYLES --- */
        .bio-container {
            /* Mobile: Stacked, 1 column */
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 3rem;
            width: 100%;
            margin: 0 auto;
            align-items: start;
        }
        /* Desktop: 2 columns, photos left, text right */
        @media (min-width: 1024px) {
            .bio-container {
                grid-template-columns: 0.35fr 0.65fr;
                gap: 5rem;
            }
        }

        .bio-collage-container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 8px; /* Gap for both mobile and desktop */
            width: 100%;
        }

        .collage-item {
            position: relative;
            border-radius: 2px;
            overflow: hidden;
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 3/4; /* Forced Aspect Ratio for all items */
        }

        .collage-img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover; /* Cover to fill without distortion */
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            display: block;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }

        /* Bio Typography Classes */
        .bio-text-large {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1.375rem; /* ~22px Mobile */
            line-height: 1.4;
            color: #FFFFFF;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .bio-text-large {
                font-size: 1.75rem; /* 28px Desktop */
                margin-bottom: 3rem;
            }
        }

        .bio-text-normal {
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            font-size: 1rem; /* 16px */
            line-height: 1.8;
            color: #9CA3AF;
            font-weight: 300;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .bio-text-normal {
                font-size: 1.125rem; /* 18px */
                margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
            }
        }

        .bio-divider {
            border: 0;
            border-top: 1px solid #2A2D34;
            margin: 2rem 0;
            width: 100%;
            opacity: 0.5;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .bio-divider { margin: 4rem 0; }
        }

        .bio-list {
            list-style: none;
            padding: 0;
            margin: 2rem 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 1.5rem;
        }
        .bio-list-item {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1rem;
            align-items: flex-start;
            color: #FFFFFF;
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 1.125rem; /* 18px */
            line-height: 1.5;
            font-family: var(--font-main);
        }
        .bio-arrow {
            color: #FFFFFF;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .bio-btn-container {
            margin-top: 4rem;
        }

        /* DESKTOP BIO COMPACT OVERRIDES (1024px+) */
        @media (min-width: 1024px) {
            .bio-text-large {
                font-size: 1.5rem;
                margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
            }
            
            .bio-text-normal {
                margin-bottom: 1rem;
            }
            
            .bio-divider {
                margin: 1.5rem 0;
            }
            
            .bio-list {
                gap: 1rem;
            }
            
            .bio-btn-container {
                margin-top: 2rem;
            }
        }

        /* Casual Labels Styles */
        .casual-label {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 6px;
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            font-style: italic;
            font-size: 11px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            pointer-events: none;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
            z-index: 10;
        }
        
        .label-left {
            left: 6px;
        }
        .label-right {
            right: 6px;
        }

        @media (min-width: 768px) {
             .casual-label { font-size: 12px; bottom: 8px; }
             .label-left { left: 8px; }
             .label-right { right: 8px; }
        }

        /* --- OFFER SECTION --- */
        .offer-wrapper {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-wrapper { border: 1px solid var(--border-color); } }
        
        .offer-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-grid { grid-template-columns: 7fr 5fr; } }
        
        .offer-list-col {
            padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .offer-list-col { padding: 4rem; border-bottom: none; border-right: 1px solid var(--border-color); } 
        }
        
        .offer-price-col {
            padding: 2rem;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-price-col { padding: 4rem; } }
        
        .check-icon-box {
            width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem;
            background-color: var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 2px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            color: white;
        }

        .price-large {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 3.75rem;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .price-large { font-size: 6rem; } }

        /* --- GUARANTEE SECTION --- */
        .guarantee-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 2rem;
            max-width: 64rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .guarantee-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } }
        
        .guarantee-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .guarantee-card { padding: 2.5rem; } }
        
        .glow-effect {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; right: 0;
            width: 8rem; height: 8rem;
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            filter: blur(50px);
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(50%, -50%);
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        .guarantee-card:hover .glow-effect { opacity: 1; }

        /* --- FAQ SECTION --- */
        .faq-container {
            max-width: 48rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        .faq-item {
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        .faq-trigger {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 1.5rem 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: flex-start;
            text-align: left;
            color: var(--text-main);
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-trigger:hover { color: var(--accent-white); }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-trigger { align-items: center; } }
        
        .faq-question {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.25;
            padding-right: 1rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-question { font-size: 1.125rem; } }
        
        .faq-content {
            max-height: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: max-height 0.3s ease, margin-bottom 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-item.active .faq-content {
            max-height: 24rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        .faq-text {
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            padding-right: 1rem;
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-text { padding-right: 2rem; } }

        /* --- FOOTER --- */
        .footer {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            padding-top: 4rem;
            padding-bottom: 3rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer { padding-top: 6rem; } }
        
        .footer-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
            padding-bottom: 3rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 4fr 8fr; gap: 5rem; margin-bottom: 5rem; } 
        }

        .footer-disclaimer {
            font-size: 0.6875rem;
            color: #4B5563;
            line-height: 1.6;
            column-count: 1;
            column-gap: 2rem;
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer-disclaimer { column-count: 2; } }
        .footer-disclaimer p { margin-bottom: 1rem; }

        /* --- ANIMATIONS --- */
        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: .5; }
        }
        @keyframes grow {
            0% { width: 0%; }
            100% { width: 100%; }
        }

        /* --- BACKGROUND NOISE --- */
        .bg-noise {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: -1;
            overflow: hidden;
            pointer-events: none;
            background-image: url('https://www.orfeoai.com/wp-content/themes/orfeoai/images/noise.png');
            opacity: 0.02;
        }

        /* --- MOBILE PADDING FIXES (Max 768px) --- */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            /* Fixes for grids and containers that touch edges on mobile */
            .services-grid, 
            .guarantee-grid, 
            .faq-container,
            .bio-container {
                padding-left: 1.5rem !important;
                padding-right: 1.5rem !important;
            }

            /* Convert Offer Wrapper to a card with margins on mobile */
            .offer-wrapper {
                margin-left: 1.5rem !important;
                margin-right: 1.5rem !important;
                width: auto !important;
                border: 1px solid var(--border-color) !important;
            }

            /* Ensure Footer container definitely has padding */
            .footer .container {
                padding-left: 1.5rem !important;
                padding-right: 1.5rem !important;
            }
        }

    </style>

                <!-- Right Column: Text -->
                <div class="w-full text-left">
                    <p class="bio-text-large">Me llamo Adrián.</p>
                    
                    <p class="bio-text-large">Y hace unos años estaba jodido. Pero jodido de verdad.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-normal">Tenía 21 años. Había pasado 4 años montando negocios que fracasaron. Agencia de marketing. Consultoría. Eventos. Criptomonedas.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-normal">Había vuelto a casa de mi madre. La había dejado con la novia. Y tenía una deuda de 4.000€ que no sabía cómo coño iba a pagar.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-normal">Vengo de una familia de clase baja. Mi madre limpiaba casas. Mi padre era camarero. Nunca tuvimos casa en propiedad. El coche era un Opel Corsa heredado de mi abuelo.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-large">Y nadie —absolutamente nadie— me enseñó cómo funcionaba el dinero.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-large">Pero yo siempre supe que quería algo más.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-large">El problema era que no tenía ni puta idea de cómo llegar ahí.</p>
    
                    <hr class="bio-divider" />
    
                    <p class="bio-text-large">Entonces descubrí las profesiones digitales.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-normal">Tenía un amigo que trabajaba de esto. Ganaba muy bien. Desde casa. Sin jefes.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-normal">Y pensé: "Aquí puedo aprender una habilidad que se paga bien, meterme en una empresa en días, y empezar a cobrar. Sin montar nada. Sin riesgo."</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-large">Aprendes. Das el servicio. Te pagan.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-large">Dejé el trabajo en diciembre. En enero gané 4.000€.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-large">Casi 4 veces más de lo que ganaba. En 30 días. Desde casa.</p>
    
                    <hr class="bio-divider" />
    
                    <p class="bio-text-normal">No porque fuera especial. Sino porque tenía una habilidad que el mercado pagaba bien.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-normal">Hoy vivo en Dubai. Tiro una piedra desde mi terraza y llega al mar.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-normal">Entreno cuando quiero. Como fuera todos los días. Me fui 48 horas a España al bautizo de mi primita. Ida y vuelta. He llevado a mi madre a Roma y a Praga.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-large">Yo decido qué hago. Y luego diseño mi día alrededor de eso.</p>
    
                    <hr class="bio-divider" />
    
                    <p class="bio-text-large">No te voy a prometer que te vas a hacer millonario.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-normal">Pero sí te puedo decir lo que me pasó a mí:</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-normal">Pasé de 1.150€ al mes en una inmobiliaria a 4.000€ desde casa. En 30 días.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-normal">Y ese cambio —pasar de un sueldo que no controlas a ganar el doble o el triple desde tu casa, sin fichar— es el cambio de paradigma más grande que he vivido.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-large">No fue hacerme rico.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-large">Fue dejar de depender.</p>
    
                    <p class="bio-text-normal">Y esa es mi intención para ti con Capital Hub, para que puedas:</p>
    
                    <ul class="bio-list">
                        <li class="bio-list-item">
                            <span class="bio-arrow">→</span>

                        </li>
                        <li class="bio-list-item">

                        </li>
                        <li class="bio-list-item">
                            <span class="bio-arrow">→</span>
                            <span>Empezar a diseñar un estilo de vida flexible, en tus propios términos.</span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>

                        <a href="#offer" class="btn btn-md btn-solid w-full" style="max-width: 100%;">

                        </style>
                    </div>
    
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

                            <span style="color: #D1D5DB; font-size: 0.95rem;">Acceso a bolsa de empleo con ofertas reales</span>

    <!-- GUARANTEE -->

                <div style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem; color: white; opacity: 0.8;">
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect width="18" height="11" x="3" y="11" rx="2" ry="2"/><path d="M7 11V7a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v4"/></svg>

        <div class="faq-container">
            <h3 class="section-title text-center text-white">Preguntas Frecuentes</h3>
            
            <div class="faq-item">
                <button class="faq-trigger">
                    <span class="faq-question">¿Necesito experiencia previa para empezar?</span>
                    <span class="text-secondary"><svg class="icon-plus" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="M12 5v14"/></svg><svg class="icon-minus hidden" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/></svg></span>
                </button>
                <div class="faq-content">
                    <p class="faq-text">No. Las formaciones están diseñadas para empezar desde cero. No importa si nunca has trabajado en digital, si no tienes estudios relacionados o si vienes de otro sector. Empiezas desde la base y avanzas paso a paso.</p>

            <div class="faq-item">

                    <span class="faq-question">¿Qué pasa después de los 14 días gratis?</span>

                </button>
                <div class="faq-content">
                    <p class="faq-text">Si decides quedarte, se activa tu membresía a 44€/mes. Si no te convence, cancelas antes de que terminen los 14 días y no se te cobra nada más. Sin permanencia, sin complicaciones.</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
                <button class="faq-trigger">
                    <span class="faq-question">¿Puedo cancelar cuando quiera?</span>
                    <span class="text-secondary"><svg class="icon-plus" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="M12 5v14"/></svg><svg class="icon-minus hidden" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/></svg></span>
                </button>
                <div class="faq-content">
                    <p class="faq-text">Sí. Cancelas cuando quieras desde tu perfil. Sin llamadas, sin emails, sin preguntas. Un clic y listo.</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
                <button class="faq-trigger">
                    <span class="faq-question">¿La bolsa de trabajo es real?</span>
                    <span class="text-secondary"><svg class="icon-plus" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="M12 5v14"/></svg><svg class="icon-minus hidden" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/></svg></span>
                </button>
                <div class="faq-content">
                    <p class="faq-text">Sí. No tendría sentido montar esto si no lo fuera. Empresas nos contactan cada semana buscando perfiles que no encuentran en ningún lado. Comerciales, marketers, gente de tech, IA, etc. Son ofertas reales de empresas reales.</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
                <button class="faq-trigger">
                    <span class="faq-question">¿En cuánto tiempo puedo conseguir trabajo?</span>
                    <span class="text-secondary"><svg class="icon-plus" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="M12 5v14"/></svg><svg class="icon-minus hidden" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/></svg></span>
                </button>
                <div class="faq-content">
                    <p class="faq-text">Depende de tu dedicación, pero nuestra promesa es que en 90 días o menos puedes conseguir tu primer trabajo remoto si sigues el proceso y te formas en serio.</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="faq-item">
                <button class="faq-trigger">
                    <span class="faq-question">¿Qué pasa si no me gusta?</span>
                    <span class="text-secondary"><svg class="icon-plus" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="M12 5v14"/></svg><svg class="icon-minus hidden" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/></svg></span>
                </button>
                <div class="faq-content">
                    <p class="faq-text">Tienes 30 días de garantía. Si no te convence, te devolvemos el 100% de tu dinero. Sin preguntas.</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="text-center" style="margin-top: 4rem;">
                <p class="text-muted" style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">¿Aún tienes dudas?</p>
                <a href="mailto:hola@capitalhub.com" class="btn btn-md btn-outline">CONTÁCTANOS</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- FOOTER -->
    <footer class="footer">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="footer-grid">
                <div>
                    <h4 class="text-white uppercase" style="font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">CAPITAL HUB</h4>
                    <!-- CHANGED: removed font-mono -->
                    <div style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-secondary); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem;">
                        <p>¿Tienes dudas?</p>
                        <p class="text-white">+34 623 600 094</p>
                        <p class="text-white">hola@capitalhub.com</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <!-- CHANGED: removed font-mono -->
                    <h5 class="text-secondary uppercase" style="font-size: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Sobre lo que ofrecemos</h5>
                    <div class="footer-disclaimer">
                        <p>Capital Hub es una plataforma de formación en profesiones digitales con acceso a una bolsa de empleo real. Todo nuestro contenido tiene fines educativos e informativos.</p>
                        <p>Los resultados que puedas obtener dependen de muchos factores: tu punto de partida, tu dedicación, el tiempo que inviertas y tu capacidad de aplicar lo aprendido. Por eso, aunque ponemos todo de nuestra parte para darte las mejores herramientas, no podemos prometer resultados específicos ni ingresos concretos. Cada persona es diferente y cada camino también.</p>
                        <p>Las cifras que mencionamos en esta página son ejemplos reales pero ilustrativos. Sirven para que entiendas el potencial del mercado, no como garantía de lo que tú vas a ganar.</p>
                        <p>Lo que sí te garantizamos es la calidad de la formación. Si accedes al contenido y no estás satisfecho, tienes 30 días para pedir un reembolso completo. Sin complicaciones.</p>
                        <p>Los testimonios que aparecen reflejan experiencias de personas reales, pero son individuales. Lo que a ellos les funcionó puede no ser exactamente igual para ti.</p>
                        <p>Nada de lo que encuentres aquí sustituye el asesoramiento de un profesional legal, fiscal o financiero. Antes de tomar decisiones importantes, consulta con quien corresponda.</p>
                        <p>Al registrarte en Capital Hub, aceptas que las decisiones que tomes y los resultados que obtengas son tu responsabilidad.</p>
                        <p>Los precios pueden cambiar sin previo aviso. Algunas ofertas incluyen servicios de suscripción con cargos recurrentes. Revisa siempre los detalles antes de comprar.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- CHANGED: removed font-mono -->
            <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #4B5563; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem;">
                <p>Este producto es propiedad de Adrián Villanueva & Capital Hub.</p>
                <div style="display: flex; gap: 1rem;">
                    <span>Copyright 2025</span>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#" style="transition: color 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.color='white'" onmouseout="this.style.color='inherit'">Política de Privacidad</a>
                </div>
            </div>
            <style>
                @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer div:last-child { flex-direction: row; } }
            </style>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <script>
        // --- LOADER LOGIC ---
        window.addEventListener('load', () => {
            const loader = document.getElementById('loader');
            // Ensure loader stays for at least 1s as per original design
            setTimeout(() => {
                loader.style.opacity = '0';
                setTimeout(() => {
                    loader.style.display = 'none';
                }, 500);
            }, 1000);
        });

        // --- CUSTOM CURSOR LOGIC ---
        const cursor = document.getElementById('custom-cursor');
        const cursorDot = document.getElementById('cursor-dot');
        const isMobile = /Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent);

        if (!isMobile) {
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                cursor.style.transform = `translate3d(${e.clientX}px, ${e.clientY}px, 0)`;
            });

            document.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => cursor.style.opacity = '1');
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => cursor.style.opacity = '0');

            document.addEventListener('mousedown', () => cursorDot.classList.add('clicked'));
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => cursorDot.classList.remove('clicked'));
        }

        // --- HEADER SCROLL LOGIC ---
        const header = document.getElementById('main-header');
        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            if (window.scrollY > 50) {
                header.classList.add('scrolled');
            } else {
                header.classList.remove('scrolled');
            }
        });

        // --- FAQ TOGGLE LOGIC ---
        const faqItems = document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item');
        faqItems.forEach(item => {
            const trigger = item.querySelector('.faq-trigger');
            const iconPlus = item.querySelector('.icon-plus');
            const iconMinus = item.querySelector('.icon-minus');

            trigger.addEventListener('click', () => {
                // Toggle active class
                item.classList.toggle('active');
                
                // Toggle icons
                if (item.classList.contains('active')) {
                    iconPlus.classList.add('hidden');
                    iconMinus.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    iconPlus.classList.remove('hidden');
                    iconMinus.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>

TRABAJO SOBRE LANDING PARA GOHIGHLEVEL

REGLAS INNEGOCIABLES:
- Actualiza ÚNICAMENTE el archivo index.html.
- NO devuelvas el código dentro del chat.
- Muestra el resultado renderizado en el panel de preview.
- Entrega el archivo final como botón/pestaña "index.html" en la parte inferior.
- NO cambiar nada que no esté explícitamente pedido.
- NO eliminar, mover ni modificar secciones existentes.
- Mantén animaciones y dinámicas existentes.

CAMBIOS A REALIZAR (SOLO ESTOS):

1. TODOS LOS BOTONES CTA → CHECKOUT:
Cambiar el href de TODOS los botones de acción de la landing para que apunten a: https://start.thecapitalhub.io/checkout
Estos son los botones afectados:
- Botón "EMPEZAR AHORA" de la navbar (header).
- Botón "EMPEZAR AHORA POR 8€" del hero.
- Botón "EMPEZAR AHORA" de la sección bio.
- Botón "QUIERO MI ACCESO" de la sección oferta.
Todos deben abrir el link en la misma pestaña.

2. BOTÓN "CONTÁCTANOS" → WHATSAPP:
Cambiar el href del botón "CONTÁCTANOS" en la sección FAQ. Actualmente apunta a mailto:hola@capitalhub.com. Cambiarlo a: https://wa.me/34623600094
Debe abrir en una nueva pestaña (target="_blank").

ENTREGA:
Devuélveme:
1) El archivo index.html actualizado como botón/pestaña.
2) El resultado renderizado en el preview.
3) Un resumen breve de los cambios aplicados.

**Reviewing the Project Scope**

I'm currently focused on dissecting the initial request to update `index.html`. My analysis centers on the explicit goal: enhancing the HighLevel landing page and updating its index file, while keeping the output as XML. I have identified the key constraints, which are limited code output in the response and keeping all updates contained to only index.html.


**Implementing the Modifications**

I've moved into implementation, and the identified changes are being applied to `index.html`. My focus is on updating the CTA button URLs across the header, hero, bio, and offer sections, with the specified checkout link. I'm carefully replacing the "CONTÁCTANOS" button URL with the WhatsApp link, including adding the `target="_blank"` attribute. I am working through the line numbers and code snippets to avoid any unintended consequences.


**Updating the Call-to-Actions**

I'm now methodically updating the Call-To-Action (CTA) button URLs within the `index.html` file. Specifically, I'm replacing all instances that originally pointed to `#offer` with the specified checkout link: `https://start.thecapitalhub.io/checkout`. This includes the buttons in the hero, bio, and offer sections, ensuring a consistent user experience. I'm focusing on preserving the existing button styles and attributes.

El siguiente código actualiza el archivo `index.html`.

**Resumen de cambios:**
1.  **Actualización de Enlaces CTA:** Se han modificado los atributos `href` de todos los botones principales de llamada a la acción (Header, Hero, Bio, Oferta) para que apunten a `https://start.thecapitalhub.io/checkout`.
2.  **Actualización de Botón de Contacto:** Se ha cambiado el enlace del botón "CONTÁCTANOS" en la sección de preguntas frecuentes (FAQ) de `mailto:hola@capitalhub.com` a `https://wa.me/34623600094`, añadiendo el atributo `target="_blank"` para que abra en una nueva pestaña tal como se solicitó.

diffs.replacement:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Capital Hub</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <!-- Updated Fonts: Ensure weights 300 and 600 are available for Inter Tight -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter+Tight:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700;900&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* --- VARIABLES & RESET --- */
        :root {
            --bg-main: #0F0F12;
            --bg-card: #18181B;
            --bg-secondary: #111113;
            --border-color: #2A2D34;
            --text-main: #F5F6F7;
            --text-secondary: #6B7280;
            --text-muted: #9CA3AF;
            --accent-white: #FFFFFF;
            --font-main: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            --font-serif: 'Inter Tight', sans-serif;
            --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; /* Prevent font scaling in landscape on iOS */
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            overflow-x: hidden;
            line-height: 1.5;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            margin: 0; /* Reset body margin for GHL compatibility */
        }

        /* --- TYPOGRAPHY --- */
        h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 500; /* Default medium */
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        p, li, a, span, div, button, input, label {
            font-family: var(--font-main);
        }
        
        /* Exception for Headlines override */
        .title-font { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }

        a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: inherit;
        }

        button {
            border: none;
            background: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: inherit;
        }

        .font-mono { font-family: var(--font-mono) !important; }
        .font-serif { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }
        .uppercase { text-transform: uppercase; }
        .text-center { text-align: center; }
        
        /* --- UTILITIES --- */
        .container {
            width: 100%;
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            padding-right: 1.5rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .container { max-width: 640px; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .container { max-width: 768px; padding-left: 2rem; padding-right: 2rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { .container { max-width: 1024px; } }
        @media (min-width: 1280px) { .container { max-width: 1280px; } }

        .flex { display: flex; }
        .flex-col { flex-direction: column; }
        .items-center { align-items: center; }
        .justify-center { justify-content: center; }
        .justify-between { justify-content: space-between; }
        .gap-2 { gap: 0.5rem; }
        .gap-3 { gap: 0.75rem; }
        .gap-4 { gap: 1rem; }
        .gap-6 { gap: 1.5rem; }
        .gap-8 { gap: 2rem; }
        .w-full { width: 100%; }
        .relative { position: relative; }
        .absolute { position: absolute; }
        .inset-0 { top: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; left: 0; }
        .z-10 { z-index: 10; }
        .z-20 { z-index: 20; }
        .hidden { display: none; }

        /* --- SELECTION --- */
        ::selection {
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            color: var(--bg-main);
        }

        /* --- LOADING SCREEN --- */
        #loader {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
        }
        .loader-content h2 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            animation: pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .loader-content h2 { font-size: 2.25rem; }
        }
        .loader-bar-container {
            width: 8rem;
            height: 1px;
            background-color: var(--border-color);
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-top: 1rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .loader-bar-container { width: 12rem; } }
        .loader-bar {
            height: 100%;
            width: 100%;
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            transform-origin: left;
            animation: grow 1.5s ease-in-out forwards;
        }

        /* --- CUSTOM CURSOR --- */
        #custom-cursor {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 9999;
            mix-blend-mode: difference;
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            opacity: 0;
        }
        #cursor-dot {
            width: 0.75rem;
            height: 0.75rem;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
            transition: transform 0.2s ease-out;
        }
        #cursor-dot.clicked {
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.5);
        }
        @media (hover: none) and (pointer: coarse) {
            #custom-cursor { display: none !important; }
            body { cursor: auto; }
        }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) {
            body { cursor: none; }
        }

        /* --- HEADER --- */
        header {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%;
            z-index: 40;
            padding: 1rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: all 0.5s ease;
            background-color: transparent;
        }
        header.scrolled {
            padding: 1rem 0;
            background-color: rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.9);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border-bottom-color: var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            header:not(.scrolled) { padding: 1.5rem 0; }
        }
        .logo-text {
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .logo-text { font-size: 1rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .logo-text { font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em; } }

        /* --- BUTTONS --- */
        .btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 2px;
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important; /* Buttons keep mono for UI feel */
            font-weight: 500;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
            position: relative;
        }
        .btn-sm { padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; font-size: 0.625rem; }
        .btn-md { padding: 1rem 2rem; font-size: 0.75rem; }
        .btn-lg { padding: 1.25rem 2.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; }
        
        .btn-solid {
            background-color: var(--accent-white);
            color: black;
        }
        .btn-solid:hover { background-color: #E5E5E5; }
        
        .btn-outline {
            background-color: transparent;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            border-color: var(--border-color);
        }
        .btn-outline:hover {
            border-color: var(--accent-white);
            background-color: var(--border-color);
        }

        .btn .icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .btn:hover .icon {
            transform: translate(2px, -2px);
        }

        /* --- HERO --- */
        .hero-section {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            overflow: hidden;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            position: relative;
        }
        .hero-video-container {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 0;
        }
        .hero-video {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            filter: grayscale(100%);
            opacity: 0.4;
        }
        .hero-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background-color: rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.8);
        }
        .hero-gradient {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(to top, #0F0F12 0%, transparent 50%, rgba(15, 15, 18, 0.5) 100%);
        }
        .hero-content {
            z-index: 10;
            padding-top: 8rem;
            padding-bottom: 5rem;
            text-align: center;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-content { padding-top: 10rem; padding-bottom: 6rem; } }

        .hero-badge {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            max-width: 100%;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .hero-badge { gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } 
        }
        .badge-dot {
            width: 0.375rem;
            height: 0.375rem;
            background-color: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .badge-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; } }
        
        .badge-text {
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important; /* CHANGED from mono */
            color: var(--text-muted);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.025em;
            white-space: normal;
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 1.25;
            font-size: 8px; /* Specific mobile requirement */
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .badge-text { font-size: 9px; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .badge-text { font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5; } }

        /* H1 STYLES - ANIMATED GRADIENT & TYPOGRAPHY */
        h1.hero-title {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.2;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            word-wrap: break-word;
            
            /* Gradient Text Logic */
            background: linear-gradient(
                90deg,
                #FFFFFF 0%,
                #9CA3AF 20%,
                #FFFFFF 40%,
                #FFFFFF 100%
            );
            background-size: 200% auto;
            color: #FFFFFF; /* Fallback */
            background-clip: text;
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            animation: textShine 6s linear infinite;
        }

        /* Mobile specific H1 overrides - Font Smoothing ensured */
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
            h1.hero-title {
                -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
                -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            }
        }

        @keyframes textShine {
            to {
                background-position: 200% center;
            }
        }

        /* UPDATED: THINNER WEIGHTS AS REQUESTED */
        .h1-light {
            font-weight: 300; /* Changed from 200 to 300 (Light) */
        }
        .h1-bold {
            font-weight: 600; /* Changed from 900/700 to 600 (SemiBold) */
        }

        @media (min-width: 640px) { h1.hero-title { font-size: 2.25rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            h1.hero-title { 
                font-size: 3.25rem;
                line-height: 1.1;
                max-width: 900px;
                margin-left: auto;
                margin-right: auto;
            } 
        }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { 
            h1.hero-title { 
                font-size: 4rem;
                max-width: 1100px;
            } 
        }

        .hero-subtitle {
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 9px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            white-space: nowrap; /* Forced single line */
        }
        @media (min-width: 640px) { .hero-subtitle { font-size: 0.75rem; } }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } }

        .price-text {
            font-size: 1.125rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .price-text { font-size: 1.25rem; } }

        .social-proof {
            margin-top: 2rem;
            padding-top: 1.5rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 32rem;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .social-proof { 
                margin-top: 3rem; 
                padding-top: 2rem;
                max-width: 100%; /* Ensure container allows full width */
                /* Removed white-space: nowrap to allow wrapping for long text if needed, while keeping layout cleaner */
                overflow: visible;
            } 
            .social-proof span { display: inline !important; }
        }

        /* --- SECTIONS --- */
        .section {
            padding: 4rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            position: relative;
            z-index: 10;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .section { padding: 6rem 0; } }

        .bg-darker { background-color: var(--bg-secondary); }

        .section-tag {
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            display: inline-block;
        }

        .section-title {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            line-height: 1.25;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .section-title { font-size: 3rem; } }

        /* --- SERVICES GRID --- */
        .services-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            max-width: 80rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
        @media (min-width: 1024px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); } }

        .service-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            position: relative;
            min-height: 250px;
            transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .service-card { padding: 2rem; min-height: 300px; } }
        .service-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent-white); }
        
        .step-number {
            font-family: var(--font-mono) !important;
            font-size: 1.875rem;
            color: var(--border-color);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .step-number { font-size: 2.25rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; } }
        .service-card:hover .step-number { color: var(--accent-white); }

        .service-icon {
            position: absolute;
            top: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--border-color);
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .service-icon { top: 2rem; right: 2rem; } }
        .service-card:hover .service-icon { color: var(--accent-white); }
        .service-icon svg {
            transform: rotate(-45deg);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .service-card:hover .service-icon svg { transform: rotate(0); }
        
        /* Typography fix for card headers */
        .service-card h4 { font-family: var(--font-serif) !important; }

        /* --- BIO SECTION STYLES --- */
        .bio-container {
            /* Mobile: Stacked, 1 column */
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 3rem;
            width: 100%;
            margin: 0 auto;
            align-items: start;
        }
        /* Desktop: 2 columns, photos left, text right */
        @media (min-width: 1024px) {
            .bio-container {
                grid-template-columns: 0.35fr 0.65fr;
                gap: 5rem;
            }
        }

        .bio-collage-container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 8px; /* Gap for both mobile and desktop */
            width: 100%;
        }

        .collage-item {
            position: relative;
            border-radius: 2px;
            overflow: hidden;
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 3/4; /* Forced Aspect Ratio for all items */
        }

        .collage-img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover; /* Cover to fill without distortion */
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            display: block;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }

        /* Bio Typography Classes */
        .bio-text-large {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1.375rem; /* ~22px Mobile */
            line-height: 1.4;
            color: #FFFFFF;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            font-weight: 500;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .bio-text-large {
                font-size: 1.75rem; /* 28px Desktop */
                margin-bottom: 3rem;
            }
        }

        .bio-text-normal {
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            font-size: 1rem; /* 16px */
            line-height: 1.8;
            color: #9CA3AF;
            font-weight: 300;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .bio-text-normal {
                font-size: 1.125rem; /* 18px */
                margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
            }
        }

        .bio-divider {
            border: 0;
            border-top: 1px solid #2A2D34;
            margin: 2rem 0;
            width: 100%;
            opacity: 0.5;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .bio-divider { margin: 4rem 0; }
        }

        .bio-list {
            list-style: none;
            padding: 0;
            margin: 2rem 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 1.5rem;
        }
        .bio-list-item {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1rem;
            align-items: flex-start;
            color: #FFFFFF;
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 1.125rem; /* 18px */
            line-height: 1.5;
            font-family: var(--font-main);
        }
        .bio-arrow {
            color: #FFFFFF;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .bio-btn-container {
            margin-top: 4rem;
        }

        /* DESKTOP BIO COMPACT OVERRIDES (1024px+) */
        @media (min-width: 1024px) {
            .bio-text-large {
                font-size: 1.5rem;
                margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
            }
            
            .bio-text-normal {
                margin-bottom: 1rem;
            }
            
            .bio-divider {
                margin: 1.5rem 0;
            }
            
            .bio-list {
                gap: 1rem;
            }
            
            .bio-btn-container {
                margin-top: 2rem;
            }
        }

        /* Casual Labels Styles */
        .casual-label {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 6px;
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            font-style: italic;
            font-size: 11px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            pointer-events: none;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
            z-index: 10;
        }
        
        .label-left {
            left: 6px;
        }
        .label-right {
            right: 6px;
        }

        @media (min-width: 768px) {
             .casual-label { font-size: 12px; bottom: 8px; }
             .label-left { left: 8px; }
             .label-right { right: 8px; }
        }

        /* --- OFFER SECTION --- */
        .offer-wrapper {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-wrapper { border: 1px solid var(--border-color); } }
        
        .offer-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-grid { grid-template-columns: 7fr 5fr; } }
        
        .offer-list-col {
            padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .offer-list-col { padding: 4rem; border-bottom: none; border-right: 1px solid var(--border-color); } 
        }
        
        .offer-price-col {
            padding: 2rem;
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .offer-price-col { padding: 4rem; } }
        
        .check-icon-box {
            width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem;
            background-color: var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 2px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            color: white;
        }

        .price-large {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 3.75rem;
            color: var(--accent-white);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .price-large { font-size: 6rem; } }

        /* --- GUARANTEE SECTION --- */
        .guarantee-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 2rem;
            max-width: 64rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .guarantee-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } }
        
        .guarantee-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .guarantee-card { padding: 2.5rem; } }
        
        .glow-effect {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; right: 0;
            width: 8rem; height: 8rem;
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            filter: blur(50px);
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(50%, -50%);
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        .guarantee-card:hover .glow-effect { opacity: 1; }

        /* --- FAQ SECTION --- */
        .faq-container {
            max-width: 48rem;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        .faq-item {
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        .faq-trigger {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 1.5rem 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: flex-start;
            text-align: left;
            color: var(--text-main);
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-trigger:hover { color: var(--accent-white); }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-trigger { align-items: center; } }
        
        .faq-question {
            font-family: var(--font-serif) !important;
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.25;
            padding-right: 1rem;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-question { font-size: 1.125rem; } }
        
        .faq-content {
            max-height: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: max-height 0.3s ease, margin-bottom 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-item.active .faq-content {
            max-height: 24rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        .faq-text {
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            padding-right: 1rem;
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .faq-text { padding-right: 2rem; } }

        /* --- FOOTER --- */
        .footer {
            background-color: var(--bg-main);
            padding-top: 4rem;
            padding-bottom: 3rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer { padding-top: 6rem; } }
        
        .footer-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            gap: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
            padding-bottom: 3rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { 
            .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 4fr 8fr; gap: 5rem; margin-bottom: 5rem; } 
        }

        .footer-disclaimer {
            font-size: 0.6875rem;
            color: #4B5563;
            line-height: 1.6;
            column-count: 1;
            column-gap: 2rem;
            font-family: var(--font-main) !important;
        }
        @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer-disclaimer { column-count: 2; } }
        .footer-disclaimer p { margin-bottom: 1rem; }

        /* --- ANIMATIONS --- */
        @keyframes pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: .5; }
        }
        @keyframes grow {
            0% { width: 0%; }
            100% { width: 100%; }
        }

        /* --- BACKGROUND NOISE --- */
        .bg-noise {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: -1;
            overflow: hidden;
            pointer-events: none;
            background-image: url('https://www.orfeoai.com/wp-content/themes/orfeoai/images/noise.png');
            opacity: 0.02;
        }

        /* --- MOBILE PADDING FIXES (Max 768px) --- */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            /* Fixes for grids and containers that touch edges on mobile */
            .services-grid, 
            .guarantee-grid, 
            .faq-container,
            .bio-container {
                padding-left: 1.5rem !important;
                padding-right: 1.5rem !important;
            }

            /* Convert Offer Wrapper to a card with margins on mobile */
            .offer-wrapper {
                margin-left: 1.5rem !important;
                margin-right: 1.5rem !important;
                width: auto !important;
                border: 1px solid var(--border-color) !important;
            }

            /* Ensure Footer container definitely has padding */
            .footer .container {
                padding-left: 1.5rem !important;
                padding-right: 1.5rem !important;
            }
        }

    </style>
